-- The active allies for the Ionian Nebula ending. Only updated during setup.
active_allies = {}

-- The locations that start with Trauma Tokens for the Ionian Nebula ending.
trauma_token_locations = { "Sickbay", "Brig" }

-- Objects that should be made uninteractable on load.
uninteractable_objects = {}

-- The setup won't continue if these objects are on the board and aren't ready. Objects are dynamically added to this array during setup. By default, it contains the board.
wait_for_objects = { "437cd7" }

-- Called after the game finishes loading.
function onLoad(saveData)
    -- Mark objects that should be uninteractable as such.
    for key, value in ipairs(uninteractable_objects) do
        local object = getObjectFromGUID(value)
        if object then
            object.interactable = false 
        end
    end

    -- Load the save data, if present.
    if saveData and saveData ~= "" then
        settings = JSON.decode(saveData)
        processSettings()
    end

    -- Update the activity and visibility of the UI.
    updateUIActivityVisibility()
end

-- Called when the game is saved.
function onSave()
    -- Save the game's settings.
    return JSON.encode(settings)
end

-- Processes the settings of the game based on their current values.
function processSettings()
    -- Loop through each expansion and update its settings.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.expansions) do
        UI.setAttribute(value.element, "isOn", value.enabled)

        -- Update the associated additional settings.
        for additionalSettingKey, additionalSettingValue in pairs(value.additionalSettings) do
            -- Make it interactable if the expansion is selected.
            UI.setAttribute(additionalSettingValue.element, "interactable", value.enabled)

            -- Enable it if the additional setting is enabled.
            UI.setAttribute(additionalSettingValue.element, "isOn", additionalSettingValue.enabled)
        end

        -- Update the associated endings.
        for endingKey, endingValue in pairs(value.endingElements) do
            -- Make it interactable if the expansion was selected.
            UI.setAttribute(endingValue, "interactable", value.enabled)
        end

        -- If the expansion enables playing with a Cylon Leader, make it interactable.
        if value.enabled and value.enablesCylonLeader then
            UI.setAttribute("Cylon Leader", "interactable", true)
        end
    end

    -- Update the other settings.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.otherSettings) do
        -- Enable it if the additional setting is enabled.
        UI.setAttribute(value.element, "isOn", value.enabled)
    end

    -- Enable the selected ending by checking the associated checkbox.
    UI.setAttribute(settings.ending, "isOn", true)

    -- Enable playing with a Cylon Leader if selected.
    if settings.playWithCylonLeader then
        UI.setAttribute("Cylon Leader", "isOn", true)
    end

    -- Update the player count.
    UI.setAttribute("Player Count", "text", settings.playerCount)

    -- Check if the variants should be enabled or disabled.
    enableDisableVariants()

    -- Update the player count.
    updateUIPlayerCount()
    
    -- If in the character selection phase, make sheets pickable.
    if settings.setupStage == 2 then
        makeCharacterSheetsPickable()
    end

    -- Handle creating board buttons that aren't on the board by default if past the setup stage.
    if settings.setupStage > 1 then
        setupBoardButtons()
    end

    -- Make character sheets of picked characters interactable.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
        local sheet = getObjectFromGUID(value.sheetGuid)
        makeCharacterSheetInteractable(sheet, settings.players[key])
    end
end

-- Sets up the buttons that aren't on the board by default, in case the game or board is reloaded.
function setupBoardButtons()
    -- If Pegasus is enabled, create the "Destroy/Repair" button for the Pegasus.
    if settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled then
        createBoardButton("createDestroyRepairPegasusButton")
    end

    -- If the ending is Earth or the "Use Demetrius and Missions" variant is enabled, create the "Destroy/Repair" button for the Resurrection Hub and the "Place/Remove Rebel Basestar" button.
    if settings.ending == "Earth" or settings.expansions.daybreak.additionalSettings.useDemetriusMissions.enabled then
        createBoardButton("createDestroyRepairHubButton")
        createBoardButton("createPlaceRemoveRebelBasestarButton")
    end
end

-- Updates the activity and visibility of all UI panels.
function updateUIActivityVisibility()
    -- If the setup hasn't been completed, determine what needs to be displayed.
    if not settings.setupCompleted then
        -- Set the current setup screen as active.
        UI.setAttribute("BsgSetup-" .. settings.setupStage, "active", true)

        -- Update the visibility of the setup UI.
        showHideSetupForPlayers()
    -- Otherwise, handle the setup being completed.
    else
        -- Set the "Open Setup" button as inactive.
        UI.setAttribute("OpenSetupPanelButton", "active", false)

        -- Show the game buttons in the side menu.
        showSideMenuGameButtons()

        -- Show the Sleeper Agent phase menu, if the phase hasn't been completed but has been started.
        if settings.sleeperAgentPhaseStarted and not settings.sleeperAgentPhaseCompleted then
            UI.setAttribute("SleeperAgentPhase", "active", true)
        end
    end
end

-- Inverts a UI visibility table, so all players currently present in it are removed, while all players not present are added.
function invertUIVisibilityTable(visibilityTable)
    local newVisibilityTable = {}

    -- Loop through the available seats.
    for key, value in ipairs(available_seats) do
        -- If they're not currently in the table, add them.
        if not table.inTable(visibilityTable, value) then
            table.insert(newVisibilityTable, value)
        end
    end

    return newVisibilityTable
end

-- Turns a visibility table (a table of players) into a string suitable for the visibility attribute.
function getVisibilityString(visibilityTable, hideForAllIfEmpty)
    local tableSize = #visibilityTable

    -- If the table is empty, hide the UI for everybody if enabled. This is done by setting the visibility to "Nobody". If disabled, everybody will see the UI.
    if hideForAllIfEmpty and tableSize == 0 then
        table.insert(visibilityTable, "Nobody")
    -- Otherwise, make sure "Nobody" is removed if it's not the only value in the table.
    elseif tableSize > 1 then
        table.removeByValue(visibilityTable, "Nobody")
    end

    -- Implode the string, separating by a pipe.
    return table.concat(visibilityTable, "|")
end

-- Shows and hides the setup UI based on who has it opened and closed.
function showHideSetupForPlayers()
    -- Determine the players that shouldn't and should see the setup UI.
    local setupVisibility = getVisibilityString(invertUIVisibilityTable(settings.setupClosedBy), true)
    local buttonVisibility = getVisibilityString(settings.setupClosedBy, true)

    -- Update the visibility settings of the current setup stage UI.
    UI.setAttribute("BsgSetup-" .. settings.setupStage, "visibility", setupVisibility)

    -- Show the button to reopen the setup to players who have closed the UI.
    UI.setAttribute("OpenSetupPanelButton", "visibility", buttonVisibility)
end

-- Resets the visibility of the setup UI for all players.
function resetSetupVisibility()
    -- Reset the table keeping track of the people who closed the UI.
    settings.setupClosedBy = { "Nobody" }

    -- Update the visibility.
    showHideSetupForPlayers()
end

-- Opens the setup panel for a given player.
function openSetupPanel(player, elementId)
    -- Remove the player from the list of players who closed the UI.
    table.removeByValue(settings.setupClosedBy, player.color)

    -- Update the visibility of the setup UI.
    showHideSetupForPlayers()
end

-- Closes the setup panel for a given player.
function closeSetupPanel(player, elementId)
    -- Add the player to the list of players who closed the UI.
    table.insert(settings.setupClosedBy, player.color)

    -- Update the visibility of the setup UI.
    showHideSetupForPlayers()
end

-- Opens the next setup panel for all players. If it's the final panel, finish the setup.
function openNextSetupPanel(player, elementId)
    local currentStage = settings.setupStage

    -- Reset the visibility of the setup UI. This makes sure everybody sees the next stage.
    resetSetupVisibility()

    -- If we've hit the final stage, mark the setup as completed. Otherwise, update the setting and open the next setup window.
    if currentStage == settings.finalStage then
        settings.setupCompleted = true

        -- Set the "Open Setup" button as inactive.
        UI.setAttribute("OpenSetupPanelButton", "active", false)
    else
        local nextStage = currentStage + 1
        settings.setupStage = nextStage
        settings.setupClosed = false
        UI.setAttribute("BsgSetup-" .. nextStage, "active", true)   
    end

    -- Disable the current window.
    UI.setAttribute("BsgSetup-" .. currentStage, "active", false) 
end

-- Fires when an expansion is enabled or disabled.
function expansionSelected(player, checked, elementId)
    local cylonLeaderSelectable = false

    -- Loop through the available expansions.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.expansions) do
        -- If the expansion's element equals the element of the checkbox, continue.
        if elementId == value.element then
            -- Mark the expansion as enabled.
            value.enabled = checked == "True" and true or false

            -- Loop through the expansion's additional settings and enable or disable them.
            for additionalSettingKey, additionalSettingValue in pairs(value.additionalSettings) do
                UI.setAttribute(additionalSettingValue.element, "interactable", value.enabled)

                -- Make sure the additional setting is disabled if the expansion is disabled.
                if not value.enabled then
                    additionalSettingValue.enabled = false
                    UI.setAttribute(additionalSettingValue.element, "isOn", false)
                end
            end

            -- Updates the expansion's ending when an expansion is selected.
            for endingKey, endingValue in ipairs(value.endingElements) do
                -- Mark the ending in question as (un)interactable.
                UI.setAttribute(endingValue, "interactable", value.enabled)
        
                -- If the expansion was disabled and the current ending is one the expansion's endings, reset the ending.
                if not value.enabled and endingValue == settings.ending then
                    UI.setAttribute("Kobol", "isOn", true)
                end
            end
        end

        -- Check if the expansion is enabled and allows a Cylon Leader.
        if value.enabled and value.enablesCylonLeader then
            cylonLeaderSelectable = true
        end
    end

    -- If an expansion enables playing with a Cylon Leader, make it interactable. Otherwise, make it uninteractable.
    UI.setAttribute("Cylon Leader", "interactable", cylonLeaderSelectable)

    -- Unset the Cylon Leader if no expansion allows playing with it.
    if not cylonLeaderSelectable then
        UI.setAttribute("Cylon Leader", "isOn", false)
        cylonLeaderSelected(player, false, "Cylon Leader")
    end

    -- Check if the variants should be enabled or disabled.
    enableDisableVariants()
end

-- Fires when an additional setting is enabled or disabled.
function additionalSettingSelected(player, checked, elementId)
    -- Loop through the available expansions.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.expansions) do
        -- Loop through the expansion's additional settings.
        for additionalSettingKey, additionalSettingValue in pairs(value.additionalSettings) do
            -- If the element ID matches the additional setting's ID, enable it.
            if elementId == additionalSettingValue.element then
                additionalSettingValue.enabled = checked == "True" and true or false
            end
        end
    end

    -- Check if the variants should be enabled or disabled.
    enableDisableVariants()
end

-- Fires when an other setting is enabled or disabled.
function otherSettingSelected(player, checked, elementId)
    -- Loop through the available other settings.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.otherSettings) do
        -- If the element ID matches the additional setting's ID, enable it.
        if elementId == value.element then
            value.enabled = checked == "True" and true or false
        end
    end

    -- Check if the variants should be enabled or disabled.
    enableDisableVariants()
end

-- Checks if variants should be enabled or disabled.
function enableDisableVariants()
    -- If in a one player game, disable the "Fully Cooperative Game" variant. Otherwise, enable it.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 then
        settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled = false
        UI.setAttribute("Fully Cooperative Game", "interactable", false) 
        UI.setAttribute("Fully Cooperative Game", "isOn", false)
    else
        UI.setAttribute("Fully Cooperative Game", "interactable", true) 
    end

    -- If Pegasus or Daybreak is enabled, disable the "Use Cylon Locations Overlay" variant. Otherwise, enable it.
    if settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled or settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
        settings.otherSettings.cylonLocationsOverlay.enabled = false
        UI.setAttribute("Cylon Locations Overlay", "interactable", false) 
        UI.setAttribute("Cylon Locations Overlay", "isOn", false)
    else
        UI.setAttribute("Cylon Locations Overlay", "interactable", true) 
    end

    -- Disable the "No Sympathizer" and Sympathetic Cylon variants if the "Fully Cooperative Game" variant or Daybreak is enabled, when playing with a Cylon Leader, or when not playing with four or six characters.
    if settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled or settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled or settings.playWithCylonLeader or (settings.playerCount ~= 4 and settings.playerCount ~= 6) then
        -- Disable the 'No Sympathizer' variant.
        settings.otherSettings.noSympathizer.enabled = false
        UI.setAttribute("No Sympathizer", "interactable", false)
        UI.setAttribute("No Sympathizer", "isOn", false)

        -- Disable the Sympathetic Cylon variant.
        settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled = false
        UI.setAttribute("Sympathetic Cylon", "interactable", false) 
        UI.setAttribute("Sympathetic Cylon", "isOn", false)
    -- Otherwise, enable or disable them based on their current settings.
    else
        -- Enable them both.
        UI.setAttribute("No Sympathizer", "interactable", true)
        UI.setAttribute("Sympathetic Cylon", "interactable", true)  

        -- Disable the "No Sympathizer" variant if the Sympathethic Cylon variant is enabled. Enable the Sympathethic Cylon variant.
        if settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled then
            settings.otherSettings.noSympathizer.enabled = false
            UI.setAttribute("No Sympathizer", "interactable", false)
            UI.setAttribute("No Sympathizer", "isOn", false)
        -- Disable the Sympathetic Cylon variant if the "No Sympathizer" variant is enabled. Enable the "No Sympathizer" variant.
        elseif settings.otherSettings.noSympathizer.enabled then
            settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled = false
            UI.setAttribute("Sympathetic Cylon", "interactable", false) 
            UI.setAttribute("Sympathetic Cylon", "isOn", false)
        end
    end

    -- Disable the "Use Motive Deck" variant if Daybreak is enabled, or when not playing with a Cylon Leader or Sympathetic Cylon.
    if settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled or not (settings.playWithCylonLeader or settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled) then
        settings.otherSettings.useMotiveDeck.enabled = false
        UI.setAttribute("Use Motive Deck", "interactable", false) 
        UI.setAttribute("Use Motive Deck", "isOn", false)  
    -- Otherwise, enable it when playing with a Cylon Leader or Sympathetic Cylon.
    elseif settings.playWithCylonLeader or settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled then
        UI.setAttribute("Use Motive Deck", "interactable", true) 
    end

    -- Disable the "Allies for All Seasons" variant if playing with the Ionian Nebula ending.
    if settings.ending == "Ionian Nebula" then
        settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.alliesForAllSeasons.enabled = false
        UI.setAttribute("Allies for All Seasons", "interactable", false) 
        UI.setAttribute("Allies for All Seasons", "isOn", false)        
    -- Otherwise, enable it if Exodus is enabled.
    elseif settings.expansions.exodus.enabled then
        UI.setAttribute("Allies for All Seasons", "interactable", true)   
    end

    -- Disable the "Use Demetrius and Missions" variant if playing with the Earth ending.
    if settings.ending == "Earth" then
        settings.expansions.daybreak.additionalSettings.useDemetriusMissions.enabled = false
        UI.setAttribute("Use Demetrius and Missions", "interactable", false) 
        UI.setAttribute("Use Demetrius and Missions", "isOn", false)
    -- Otherwise, enable it if Daybreak is enabled.
    elseif settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
        UI.setAttribute("Use Demetrius and Missions", "interactable", true)        
    end
end

-- Fires when a ending is selected.
function endingSelected(player, checked, elementId)
    settings.ending = elementId

    -- Check if the variants should be enabled or disabled.
    enableDisableVariants()
end

-- Fires when playing with a Cylon Leader is selected.
function cylonLeaderSelected(player, checked, elementId)
    settings.playWithCylonLeader = checked == "True" and true or false

    if settings.playWithCylonLeader then
        -- If playing with a Cylon Leader is selected, enable increasing the count.
        UI.setAttribute("Increase Player Count", "interactable", true)

        -- If the current player count is smaller than or equal to 4, set it to 4 and disable the decrease button as that is the minimum to player with Cylon Leaders.
        if settings.playerCount <= 4 then
            setPlayerCount(4)
            UI.setAttribute("Decrease Player Count", "interactable", false)
        end
    else
        -- If playing with a Cylon Leader is unselected and we're not on the minimum player count, enable decreasing the count.
        if settings.playerCount > 1 then
            UI.setAttribute("Decrease Player Count", "interactable", true)
        end
        -- If the current player count is 7, decrease it to 6 as the maximum changes.
        if settings.playerCount == 7 then
            setPlayerCount(6)
        -- If the current player count is 6, prevent it from being increased.
        elseif settings.playerCount == 6 then
            UI.setAttribute("Increase Player Count", "interactable", false)
        end
    end

    -- Check if the variants should be enabled or disabled.
    enableDisableVariants()
end

-- Fires when the reduce player count button is clicked.
function decreasePlayerCount(player, elementId)
    local currentPlayerCount = getPlayerCountFromUI()
    local newPlayerCount = currentPlayerCount - 1

    -- The minimum count with and without a Cylon Leader.
    local minCount = settings.playWithCylonLeader and 4 or 1

    -- Disable the decrease button if the minimum count is hit.
    if newPlayerCount <= minCount then
        UI.setAttribute("Decrease Player Count", "interactable", false)
    end

    -- Enable the increase button and set the player count.
    UI.setAttribute("Increase Player Count", "interactable", true)
    setPlayerCount(newPlayerCount)
end

-- Fires when the increase player count button is clicked.
function increasePlayerCount(player, elementId)
    local currentPlayerCount = getPlayerCountFromUI()
    local newPlayerCount = currentPlayerCount + 1
    local maxCount = settings.playWithCylonLeader and 7 or 6 

    -- Disable the increase button if the maximum count is hit.
    if newPlayerCount >= maxCount then
        UI.setAttribute("Increase Player Count", "interactable", false)
    end

    -- Enable the decrease button and set the player count.
    UI.setAttribute("Decrease Player Count", "interactable", true)
    setPlayerCount(newPlayerCount)
end

-- Gets the current player count from the UI element.
function getPlayerCountFromUI()
    return tonumber(UI.getAttribute("Player Count", "text"))
end

-- Gets the current player count from the settings.
function getCurrentPlayerCount()
    return table.length(settings.players)
end

-- Sets the current player count.
function setPlayerCount(playerCount)
    UI.setAttribute("Player Count", "text", playerCount)
    settings.playerCount = playerCount

    updateUIPlayerCount()

    -- Check if the variants should be enabled or disabled.
    enableDisableVariants()
end

-- Fires when the start setup button is clicked. Handles setting up the game board.
function startSetup(player, elementId, alt_click)
    -- Disable the button and change its text.
    UI.setAttribute("StartSetupButton", "interactable", false)
    UI.setAttribute("StartSetupButton", "text", "Working...")

    -- Make all settings uninteractable so they aren't changed while the game is being set up.
    makeInitialSettingsUninteractable()

    -- Set up Pegasus, if it's enabled.
    if settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled then
        setupPegasus()
    end

    -- Set up Exodus, if it's enabled.
    if settings.expansions.exodus.enabled then
        setupExodus()
    end

    -- Set up Daybreak, if it's enabled.
    if settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
        setupDaybreak()
    end

    -- Set up the Cylon Locations overlay, if Pegasus, Daybreak or the variant is enabled.
    if settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled or settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled or settings.otherSettings.cylonLocationsOverlay.enabled then
        setupCylonLocationsOverlay()
    end   

    -- Set the custom rule book URL on the tablet.
    setCustomRuleBookUrl()

    -- Wait for everything to have entered the board and be ready before the setup continues. This is a very expensive function, but necessary so everything is loaded before continuing.
    Wait.condition(continueSetup, function()
        -- Loop through the expansions and check if any are enabled.
        for key, value in pairs(settings.expansions) do
            -- If at least one expansion is enabled and there's no objects being checked for readiness, wait. This means the objects from the expansions haven't been moved out of the box yet. An enabled expansion means that there's always at least one object being waited for.
            if value.enabled and #wait_for_objects == 0 then
                return false
            end
        end

        -- Loop through each object that will be checked for readiness.
        for key, value in ipairs(wait_for_objects) do
            local object = getObjectFromGUID(value)

            -- If the object hasn't spawned in yet, the board is not ready to continue.
            if object == nil then
                return false
            end

            -- If the object is not ready, the board is not ready to continue.
            if not isObjectReady(object) then
                return false
            end
        end

        -- Loop through each deck zone and make sure everything's ready there.
        for key, value in pairs(decks) do
            if value.guid then
                local deck = getObjectFromGUID(value.guid)
                -- Loop through each object in each deck zone and check if it's ready.
                for objectKey, objectValue in pairs(deck.getObjects()) do
                    if objectValue ~= nil and not isObjectReady(objectValue) then
                        return false
                    end
                end
            end
        end

        -- Clear the array.
        wait_for_objects = {}

        return true
    end)    
end

-- Determines if an object is ready. Determined by if it's not spawning, not loading custom assets and is resting.
function isObjectReady(object)
    return not object.spawning and not object.loading_custom and object.resting
end

-- Makes all initial setting options uninteractable.
function makeInitialSettingsUninteractable()
    -- Loop through the settings and make their elements uninteractable.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.expansions) do
        -- Make the expansion checkbox uninteractable.
        UI.setAttribute(value.element, "interactable", false)

        -- Make the ending radio buttons uninteractable.
        for endingKey, endingValue in ipairs(value.endingElements) do
            UI.setAttribute(endingValue, "interactable", false)
        end
        
        -- Make the additional setting checkboxes uninteractable.
        for additionalSettingKey, additionalSettingValue in pairs(value.additionalSettings) do
            UI.setAttribute(additionalSettingValue.element, "interactable", false)           
        end
    end

    -- Loop through the other settings and make their elements uninteractable.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.otherSettings) do
        UI.setAttribute(value.element, "interactable", false)  
    end

    -- Make the default ending uninteractable.
    UI.setAttribute("Kobol", "interactable", false)

    -- Make the increase/decrease player count buttons uninteractable.
    UI.setAttribute("Decrease Player Count", "interactable", false)
    UI.setAttribute("Increase Player Count", "interactable", false)  

    -- Make the Cylon Leader checkbox uninteractable.
    UI.setAttribute("Cylon Leader", "interactable", false)
end

-- Continue the setup process after loading has finished.
function continueSetup()
    -- If the Cylon Fleet Board is enabled, remove all Cylon Attack cards from the Crisis and Super Crisis decks. Also remove the Mining Asteroid destination if Pegasus is enabled.
    if settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.cylonFleetBoard.enabled then
        removeCylonAttackCards() 
    end

    -- If playing a fully cooperative game, remove certain Quorum cards from the game.
    if settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled then
        removeNonCooperativeQuorumCards()
    end

    -- If playing with the "Allies for All Seasons" variant, remove the Disaster Tokens from the game.
    if settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.alliesForAllSeasons.enabled then
        removeDisasterTokens()
    end

    -- Shuffle every deck that has cards in it.
    shuffleEverything()

    -- If playing with the "Use Motive Deck" variant, remove certain Motive cards. Must be done after shuffling.
    if settings.otherSettings.useMotiveDeck.enabled then
        removePegasusMotiveCards()
    end

    -- Set up a one player game, if applicable.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 then
        setUpOnePlayerGame()  
    end

    -- Open the next setup panel.
    openNextSetupPanel(player, elementId)

    -- Move each player's camera to the character sheets.
    moveEachPlayersCamera(camera_positions["character_sheets"])

    -- Make the character sheets pickable.
    makeCharacterSheetsPickable()
end

-- Sets up a one player game.
function setUpOnePlayerGame()
    -- Get the players.
    local players = Player.getPlayers()

    -- Determines if the main hand is present.
    local mainHandPresent = getPlayerByColor(one_player_hands.main) ~= nil

    -- The text sent to the player to inform them they're picking their main character.
    local pickingMainCharacterText = "You are now selecting your main character."

    -- If the main hand is not present, set the first player to that color.
    if not mainHandPresent then
        players[1].changeColor(one_player_hands.main)

        -- Inform the player.
        broadcastToColor("When playing with the one player variant, the player must be seated in the '" .. one_player_hands.main .. "' seat. You have been moved there automatically.", one_player_hands.main)

        -- Move their camera to the character sheets after a short while, as changing color moves the player's camera.
        Wait.time(function()
            players[1].lookAt(camera_positions["character_sheets"])

            -- Inform the player they are picking their main character.
            broadcastToColor(pickingMainCharacterText, one_player_hands.main)   
        end, 2)
    else
        -- Inform the player they are picking their main character.
        broadcastToColor(pickingMainCharacterText, one_player_hands.main)   
    end
end

-- Fires after a character has been selected in a one player game.
function onePlayerCharacterSelected()
    -- The main character was selected.
    if getCurrentPlayerCount() == 1 then
        -- Get the main player.
        local mainPlayer = getPlayerByColor(one_player_hands.main)

        -- Change their player color to the assist seat.
        mainPlayer.changeColor(one_player_hands.assist)

        -- Inform them.
        broadcastToColor("You have selected your main character and must now pick your assist character. You have been automatically moved into the assist seat ('" .. one_player_hands.assist .. "').", one_player_hands.assist)

        -- Move their camera to the character sheets after a short while, as changing color moves the player's camera.
        Wait.time(function()
            mainPlayer.lookAt(camera_positions["character_sheets"])

            -- Inform the player they are picking their main character.
            broadcastToColor("You are now selecting your assist character.", one_player_hands.assist)   
        end, 2)
    else
        -- Get the assist player.
        local assistPlayer = getPlayerByColor(one_player_hands.assist)

        -- Check if the assist player exists. If not, the main character may be changing characters.
        if assistPlayer then
            -- Change their player color to the main seat.
            assistPlayer.changeColor(one_player_hands.main)

            -- Inform them.
            broadcastToColor("You have selected your main character and assist character and have automatically been moved back into the main seat ('" .. one_player_hands.main .. "').", one_player_hands.main)
        end
    end
end

-- Gets a player by their color.
function getPlayerByColor(color)
    -- Loop through the player until a match is reached.
    for key, value in ipairs(Player.getPlayers()) do
        if value.color == color then
            return value
        end 
    end
end

-- Moves the camera of each player to a given position.
function moveEachPlayersCamera(camera_position)
    for key, value in pairs(hand_positions) do
        Player[key].lookAt(camera_position)
    end
end

-- Shuffles all objects in the deck zones.
function shuffleEverything()
    for key, value in pairs(decks) do
        if value.guid then
            local zone = getObjectFromGUID(value.guid)
            -- Loop through all objects in the zone. If they contain more than one object, shuffle it.
            for key, value in pairs(zone.getObjects()) do
                if value.getQuantity() > 1 then 
                    value.shuffle()
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Wait one second before continuing to set up other objects that rely on shuffling.
    Wait.time(function()
        -- After everything's been shuffled, set up the game board. Done at this point so the civilian ships have been shuffled.
        setupGameBoard()

        -- If the ending is the Ionian Nebula, place the Trauma tokens on the sickbay and brig. Note that the "Allies for All Seasons" variant does not use this mechanic.
        if settings.ending == "Ionian Nebula" then
            placeTraumaTokens()
        end

        -- Set up the Destiny deck.
        buildDestinyDeck()
    end, 1)
end

-- Places Trauma tokens on the sickbay and brig.
function placeTraumaTokens()
    local traumaTokenStack = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.trauma_tokens.guid), { "Deck" }, true)

    -- Grab two tokens from the stack and place them in the locations.
    for key, value in ipairs(trauma_token_locations) do
        -- Get the position and move the Trauma token there.
        local adjustedLocation = getAdjustedMapLocation(value)
        local position = map_locations[adjustedLocation]
        traumaTokenStack.takeObject({
            index = 0,
            position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(position),
            rotation = { 180, 0, 0 }
        })
    end
end

-- Removes all Cylon Attack cards from the Crisis and Super Crisis decks. Also removes the Mining Asteroid destination if Pegasus is enabled.
function removeCylonAttackCards()
    local crisisDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.crisis.guid), { "Deck" }, false)
    local superCrisisDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.super_crisis.guid), { "Deck" }, false)

    -- Loop through the Crisis deck and remove the Cylon Attack cards. Lock the cards so they don't stack.
    for key, value in ipairs(crisisDeck.getObjects()) do
        if getCardType(value) == "Crisis" and getCardAttribute(value) == "Cylon Attack" then
            crisisDeck.takeObject({
                guid = value.guid,
                position = { 0, -10, 0 },
                smooth = false,
                callback_function = function(object) removeFromGame(object) end
            }).setLock(true)
        end
    end

    -- Loop through the Super Crisis deck and remove the Cylon Attack cards. Lock the cards so they don't stack.
    for key, value in ipairs(superCrisisDeck.getObjects()) do
        if getCardType(value) == "Super Crisis" and getCardAttribute(value) == "Cylon Attack" then
            superCrisisDeck.takeObject({
                guid = value.guid,
                position = { 0, -10, 0 },
                smooth = false,
                callback_function = function(object) removeFromGame(object) end
            }).setLock(true)
        end
    end

    -- Move the Mining Asteroid destination to the Pegasus box, if Pegasus is enabled. Lock the card so it doesn't stack.
    if settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled then
        local destinationDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.destination.guid), { "Deck" }, false)
        local pegasusBox = getObjectFromGUID("6bdbf9")

        destinationDeck.takeObject({
            guid = "e2522f",
            position = { 0, -10, 0 },
            smooth = false,
            callback_function = function(object) pegasusBox.putObject(object) end
        }).setLock(true)
    end
end

-- Removes certain Quorum cards from the game for the "Fully Cooperative Game" variant. 
function removeNonCooperativeQuorumCards()
    -- Get the Quorum deck.
    local quorumDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.quorum.guid), { "Deck" }, false)

    -- Cards with these names will be removed.
    local removeNames = {
        "Arrest Order",
        "Assign Arbitrator",
        "Encourage Mutiny",
        "Release Cylon Mugshots"
    }

    -- Loop through the Quorum deck and remove the cards in question. Lock the cards so they don't stack.
    for key, value in ipairs(quorumDeck.getObjects()) do
        if table.inTable(removeNames, value.name) then
            quorumDeck.takeObject({
                guid = value.guid,
                position = { 0, -10, 0 },
                smooth = false,
                callback_function = function(object) removeFromGame(object) end
            }).setLock(true)
        end
    end
end

-- Removes Disaster Tokens from the game for the "Allies for All Seasons" variant.
function removeDisasterTokens()
    -- Get the Trauma Token deck.
    local traumaTokenDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.trauma_tokens.guid), { "Deck" }, false)

    -- Loop through the Trauma Token deck and remove the Disaster Tokens.
    for key, value in ipairs(traumaTokenDeck.getObjects()) do
        if value.name == "Disaster Trauma Token" then
            traumaTokenDeck.takeObject({
                guid = value.guid,
                position = { 0, -10, 0 },
                smooth = false,
                callback_function = function(object) removeFromGame(object) end
            }).setLock(true)
        end
    end    
end

-- Removes certain Motive cards from the game for the "Use Motive Deck" variant.
function removePegasusMotiveCards()
    -- Get the Motive deck.
    local motiveDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.agenda_motive.guid), { "Deck" }, false)

    -- Determines if a Cylon allegiance card has been removed.
    local cylonAllegianceCardRemoved = false

    -- Loop through the Motive deck and remove the "Make an Ally" card and a random Cylon allegiance card. The first Cylon allegiance card is removed, which is always a random one as the deck is shuffled before this.
    for key, value in ipairs(motiveDeck.getObjects()) do
        if value.name == "Make an Ally" or (cylonAllegianceCardRemoved == false and getCardAttribute(value) == "Cylon") then
            motiveDeck.takeObject({
                guid = value.guid,
                position = { 0, -10, 0 },
                smooth = false,
                callback_function = function(object) removeFromGame(object) end
            }).setLock(true)

            cylonAllegianceCardRemoved = true
        end
    end
end

-- Used during setup. Takes an object from a container and places it.
function takeFromContainer(container, guid, position, rotation, adjustPosition, callback)
    -- Default adjusting the position to true.
    if adjustPosition == nil then
        adjustPosition = true
    end

    -- Take the object from the container and move it into position.
    return container.takeObject({
        guid = guid,
        position = adjustPosition and adjustPositionAboveDeck(position) or position,
        rotation = rotation,
        smooth = false,
        callback_function = callback
    })
end

-- Used during setup. Takes a bag from an expansion box and then calls the callback, so the contents of the bag can be placed on the board.
function takeFromExpansionBag(expansionBox, guid, callback)
    -- Take the bag from the expansion box and move it somewhere hidden. Once it's ready, the callback will be called.
    return expansionBox.takeObject({
        guid = guid,
        position = { 0, -10, 0 },
        smooth = false,
        callback_function = callback
    })
end

-- Removes an object from the game by moving it into the "Removed Objects" bag.
function removeFromGame(object)
    local removedObjectsBag = getObjectFromGUID("ddb8a5")

    -- Move the object into the bag.
    removedObjectsBag.putObject(object)
end

-- Set up the Cylon Locations overlay.
function setupCylonLocationsOverlay()
    -- Get the box. Use the Pegasus box if Daybreak is not enabled and Pegasus is, otherwise use the Daybreak box.
    local box = (not settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled and settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled) and getObjectFromGUID("6bdbf9") or getObjectFromGUID("9fac0e")

    -- Get the new Cylon Locations underlay. The GUID is different between the Daybreak and Pegasus box.
    local newCylonLocationsUnderlay = (not settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled and settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled) and "b90dd9" or "091216"

    -- Remove the old Cylon Locations underlay.
    local oldCylonLocationsUnderlay = getObjectFromGUID("276f49")
    removeFromGame(oldCylonLocationsUnderlay)

    -- Add the new Cylon Locations underlay.
    addExpansionBoard(box, newCylonLocationsUnderlay, { -31.90, 0.68, -1.4 }, { 0, 180, 0 })
    
    -- Get the current custom object data of the board.
    local board = getObjectFromGUID("437cd7")
    local boardData = board.getCustomObject()

    -- Replace the diffuse with that of the board with the Cylon Locations overlay.
    boardData.diffuse = "https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/1004808899014279389/DC641644B1CFB96D2D411637AB2195111AFA7E22/"

    -- Set the modified custom object data on the board and reload it.
    board.setCustomObject(boardData)
    board.reload()

    -- Once the board has finished loading, recreate the buttons that aren't on the board by default.
    Wait.condition(function()
        setupBoardButtons()
    end, function()
        local reloadedBoard = getObjectFromGUID("437cd7")
        return reloadedBoard ~= nil and isObjectReady(reloadedBoard)
    end)
end

-- Sets up the Pegasus expansion.
function setupPegasus()
    -- Get the Pegasus box.
    local pegasusBox = getObjectFromGUID("6bdbf9")

    -- Replace the Investigative Committee cards from the base game.
    local politicsDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.politics.guid), { "Deck" }, true)

    for key, value in ipairs(politicsDeck.getObjects()) do
        local height = 0
        if value.name == "Investigative Committee" then
            politicsDeck.takeObject({
                guid = value.guid,
                position = { 0, 0, 0 + height },
                smooth = false,
                callback_function = function(object) removeFromGame(object) end
            })
            -- Increase the height so the cards don't form a stack.
            height = height + 10
        end
    end

    -- Place the Pegasus.
    addExpansionBoard(pegasusBox, "b8013e", { 35.18, 0.71, -0.41 }, { 0, 180, 0 })

    -- Create the "Destroy/Repair" button for the Pegasus.
    createBoardButton("createDestroyRepairPegasusButton")

    -- Add the Quorum cards.
    addExpansionQuorumCards(pegasusBox, "339a93")

    -- Add the Destination cards.
    addExpansionDestinationCards(pegasusBox, "b35b34")

    -- Add the Super Crisis cards.
    addExpansionSuperCrisisCards(pegasusBox, "affc35")

    -- Add the Crisis cards.
    addExpansionCrisisCards(pegasusBox, "72d903")

    -- Add the Skill cards.
    addExpansionSkillCards(pegasusBox, "b84bb6", not settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled and true or false)

    -- Add the Loyalty cards.
    addExpansionLoyaltyCards(pegasusBox, "714285")

    -- Add the character sheets.
    takeFromExpansionBag(pegasusBox, "e44682", function(object) 
        addExpansionCharacterObjects(object, pegasusBox, "sheets") 
    end)

    -- Add the character tokens.
    takeFromExpansionBag(pegasusBox, "faabb4", function(object) 
        addExpansionCharacterObjects(object, pegasusBox, "tokens") 
    end)

    -- Add the piloting tokens.
    takeFromExpansionBag(pegasusBox, "3f77da", function(object) 
        addExpansionCharacterObjects(object, pegasusBox, "pilotingTokens") 
    end)

    -- Add the Pegasus damage tokens.
    takeFromContainer(pegasusBox, "038b3b", decks.pegasus_damage.position, { 180, 180, 0 }, true, function(object)
        -- Lock them when they're in place.
        Wait.condition(function()
            object.setLock(true)
        end, function()
            return object.resting
        end)
    end)

    -- Replace the Sympathizer with the Sympathetic Cylon if enabled.
    if settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled then
        replaceSympathizer(pegasusBox, "c23013")
    end

    -- If playing with a Cylon Leader or Sympathetic Cylon and Daybreak is disabled, add the Agenda deck and Infiltration Reference.
    if (settings.playWithCylonLeader or settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled) and not settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
        -- If the "Use Motive Deck" variant is disabled, deal the Agenda deck.
        if not settings.otherSettings.useMotiveDeck.enabled then
            local agendaDeckGuid

            -- Determine which Agenda deck to use. With four players, six players or a Sympathetic Cylon, use the Sympathetic deck. Otherwise, use the Hostile deck.
            if settings.playerCount == 4 or settings.playerCount == 6 or settings.otherSettings.sympatheticCylon.enabled then
                agendaDeckGuid = "4b0a16"

            end

            -- Move the Agenda Deck.
            takeFromContainer(pegasusBox, agendaDeckGuid, decks.agenda_motive.position, { 180, -90, 0 })
        -- Otherwise, deal the Motive deck from the Daybreak box.

            takeFromContainer(daybreakBox, "951ff0", decks.agenda_motive.position, { 180, -90, 0 })
        end

    -- Add Scar if the Cylon Fleet Board is disabled.

        takeFromContainer(pegasusBox, "cbbe4d", { -43.21, 0.74, 21.97 }, { 0, 180, 0 })
    end

    -- Add the New Caprica objects if it's set as the ending.
    if settings.ending == "New Caprica" then
        -- Place the New Caprica board.
        addExpansionBoard(pegasusBox, "1e8972", { 54.50, 1.72, 0.00 }, { 0, -90, 0 })

        replaceEnding(pegasusBox, "2dd318")

-- Add the character sheets and tokens from an expansion to the board.
function addExpansionCharacterObjects(bag, box, type)
    -- Loop through the objects in the bag.
    for key, value in ipairs(bag.getObjects()) do
        -- Get the relevant character.
        for characterKey, characterValue in ipairs(characters) do
            -- If the sheet/token GUID matches, continue.
            if (characterValue.sheetGuid == value.guid and type == "sheets") or (characterValue.tokenGuid == value.guid and type == "tokens") or (characterValue.pilotingTokenGuid == value.guid and type == "pilotingTokens") then
                -- If the character is not a Cylon Leader or playing with a Cylon Leader is enabled and we're not dealing with piloting tokens, continue.
                if (characterValue.role ~= "Cylon Leader" or settings.playWithCylonLeader) and type ~= "pilotingTokens" then
                    bag.takeObject({
                        guid = value.guid,
                        position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(type == "sheets" and characterValue.sheetPosition or characterValue.tokenPosition),
                        rotation = type == "sheets" and { 0, -90, 0 } or { 0, 90, 0 },
                        callback_function = function(object)
                            -- Do not continue setup until the sheet/token is ready.
                            table.insert(wait_for_objects, object.getGUID())
                        
                            -- Lock the object when it's in place.
                            Wait.condition(function()
                                object.setLock(true)
                            end, function()
                               return object.resting 
                            end)
                        end
                    })
                end

                -- If the character is not a Cylon Leader or playing with a Cylon Leader is enabled and if the character can pilot and we're dealing with piloting tokens, move the piloting token.
                if (characterValue.role ~= "Cylon Leader" or settings.playWithCylonLeader) and (characterValue.canPilot and type == "pilotingTokens") then
                    bag.takeObject({
                        guid = value.guid,
                        position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(characterValue.pilotingTokenPosition),
                        rotation = { 0, -90, 0 },
                        callback_function = function(object)
                            -- Do not continue setup until the token is ready.
                            table.insert(wait_for_objects, object.getGUID())

                            -- Lock the object when it's in place.
                            Wait.condition(function()
                                object.setLock(true)
                            end, function()
                               return object.resting 
                            end)
                        end
                    })
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Delete the bag if it it's empty, otherwise move it back to the box.
    if #bag.getObjects() == 0 then
        destroyObject(bag)
    else
        box.putObject(bag)
    end
end

-- Add the Skill cards from the expansion bag to their respective deck.
function addSkillCardsCallback(bag, expansionBox, includeTreachery)
    -- Loop through the bag and grab the skill card deck. Move it to the right base deck based on its description.
    for key, value in ipairs(bag.getObjects()) do
        -- Get the card's type.
        local cardType = getCardType(value)

        -- Get the deck's position.
        local skillCardDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks[string.lower(cardType)].guid), { "Deck" }, false)
        local position = staging_ground

        -- If there's not yet a deck for this type, move the cards to the deck's intended position instead.
        if skillCardDeck == nil then
            position = decks[string.lower(cardType)].position
        end

        -- Do not add treachery cards unless explicitely enabled (for Pegasus/Daybreak treachery support).
        if cardType ~= "Treachery" or includeTreachery then
            takeFromContainer(bag, value.guid, position, { 0, 180, 180 }, false, function(object)
                -- Only move it into the deck if one exists.
                if skillCardDeck ~= nil then
                    skillCardDeck.putObject(object)
                end
            end)
        end
    end

    -- Delete the bag if it it's empty, otherwise move it back to the box.
    if #bag.getObjects() == 0 then
        destroyObject(bag)
    else
        expansionBox.putObject(bag)
    end
end

-- Add the Loyalty cards from the expansion bag to their respective deck.
function addLoyaltyCardsCallback(bag, expansionBox)
    -- Loop through the bag and grab the contents. Move it to the right base deck based on its description.
    for key, value in ipairs(bag.getObjects()) do
        local deckGuid

        -- Determine the position based on the description.
        if getCardType(value) == "Loyalty" and getCardAttribute(value) == "Human" then
            deckGuid = decks.human_loyalty.guid
        else
            deckGuid = decks.cylon_loyalty.guid
        end

        takeFromContainer(bag, value.guid, staging_ground, { 0, 90, 180 }, false, function(object)
            local loyaltyCardDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(deckGuid), { "Deck" }, false)
            loyaltyCardDeck.putObject(object)
        end)
    end

    -- Delete the bag if it it's empty, otherwise move it back to the box.
    if #bag.getObjects() == 0 then
        destroyObject(bag)
    else
        expansionBox.putObject(bag)
    end
end

-- Sets the custom rule book URL on the tablet.
function setCustomRuleBookUrl()
    local tablet = getObjectFromGUID("6c2f22")
    local baseUrl = "https://jbiatek.github.io/BSGRulebook/rulebook.html"
    local customUrl = baseUrl

    -- Set the ending by taking the chosen ending, lowercasing it and removing spaces.
    customUrl = customUrl .. "?" .. string.gsub(string.lower(settings.ending), "%s+", "")

    -- Set the expansions and their additional settings by looping through the enabled ones and lowercasing them.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.expansions) do
        if value.enabled then
            customUrl = customUrl .. "&" .. string.lower(key) 

            -- Loop through the additional settings of the expansion and add them if enabled.
            for additionalSettingKey, additionalSettingValue in pairs(value.additionalSettings) do
                if additionalSettingValue.enabled then
                    customUrl = customUrl .. "&" .. additionalSettingValue.rulebookName
                end
            end
        end
    end

    -- Loop through the other settings add them if enabled.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.otherSettings) do
        if value.rulebookName and value.enabled then
            customUrl = customUrl .. "&" .. value.rulebookName
        end
    end     

    -- Set the Cylon Leader setting.
    if settings.playWithCylonLeader then
        customUrl = customUrl .. "&cylonleader"
    end

    -- If playing with one or two players or when playing a fully cooperative game, enable the "Show other official game variants" setting.
    if settings.playerCount < 3 or settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled then
        customUrl = customUrl .. "&variants"
    end

    -- Set the tablet's URL to the custom URL.
    tablet.browser.url = customUrl
end

-- Stacks tokens on the board.
function stackTokensCallback(bag, tokenPosition, rotation, split, splitPosition)
    -- Loop through the bag and grab the tokens. Move them to their spot. Add extra height each time so they stay in position.
    local extraHeight = 0

    -- Keep track of the amount of tokens moved and the point where the split starts.
    local count = 0
    local splitPoint = math.floor(#bag.getObjects() / 2)

    for key, value in ipairs(bag.getObjects()) do
        -- If we don't have to split the pile, just continue.
        if not split then
            takeFromContainer(bag, value.guid, { tokenPosition[1], tokenPosition[2] + extraHeight, tokenPosition[3] }, rotation, false)
        else
            -- If we're over half, shift the position right. Otherwise, shift the position left.
            local usePosition = splitPoint < count and tokenPosition or splitPosition
            takeFromContainer(bag, value.guid, { usePosition[1], usePosition[2] + extraHeight, usePosition[3] }, rotation, false)

            -- If we're about to split, reset the height.
            if splitPoint == count then
                extraHeight = 0
            end
        end

        extraHeight = extraHeight + 0.1
        count = count + 1
    end

    -- Destroy the bag.
    destroyObject(bag)
end

-- Makes the character sheets pickable.

        if sheet and not hasCharacterBeenPicked(value.sheetGuid) then

            sheet.createButton({
                click_function = "selectCharacter",
                font_size = 200,

                position = { 0.30, 0.19, -3.18 },

end

-- Makes the character sheets unpickable.

    for key, value in ipairs(characters) do

        if sheet and not hasCharacterBeenPicked(value.sheetGuid) then

-- Makes a character sheet interactable, by adding the relevant buttons.
function makeCharacterSheetInteractable(sheet, characterData)
    -- Add the change character button to the sheet.
    sheet.createButton({
        click_function = "changeCharacter",
        font_size = 110,
        function_owner = Global,
        height = 300,
        label = "Change Character",
        position = { 4, 0.19, -3.18 },
        width = 900
    })

    -- Determine the base Z position for the buttons.
    local zPosition = -2.1

    -- Add the draw cards button if the character has defined base sets. Do not do so if playing a fully cooperative game, as in that variant one fewer card of the player's choice is drawn. Do not do so either for one player games, where the character can draw one card from their assist character.
    if characterData.draw.base and not settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled and settings.playerCount > 1 then
        sheet.createButton({
            click_function = "drawCards",
            font_size = 110,
            function_owner = Global,
            height = 300,
            label = "Draw Cards",
            position = { -4.3, 0.19, zPosition },
            width = 900
        })
        
        -- Increase the Z position for the next buttons.
        zPosition = -1.35
    end

    -- Keep track of buttons for types that were already added.
    local addedTypes = {}

    -- If it's a fully cooperative game`or one player game, add a button for each non-choice draw option, if the character has defined base sets.
    if (settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled or settings.playerCount == 1 ) and characterData.draw.base then
        for key, value in pairs(characterData.draw.base) do
            zPosition = addDrawCardButton(sheet, key, zPosition, addedTypes)
        end
    end
    
    -- Loop through the choice draws (where you can choose between two cards) and add buttons for each.
    if characterData.draw.choices then
        for choiceKey, choiceValue in ipairs(characterData.draw.choices) do
            for cardKey, cardValue in ipairs(choiceValue) do
                zPosition = addDrawCardButton(sheet, cardValue, zPosition, addedTypes)
            end
        end 
    end
end

-- Adds a button to draw a specific card type to a character sheet.
function addDrawCardButton(sheet, cardType, zPosition, addedTypes)
    -- Skip types that have already been added.
    if table.inTable(addedTypes, cardType) then
        return zPosition
    end

    -- Create the button.
    sheet.createButton({
        click_function = "drawCard" .. cardType,
        font_size = 110,
        function_owner = Global,
        height = 300,
        label = "Draw " .. cardType,
        position = {-4.3, 0.19, zPosition},
        width = 900,
        visibility = "Red"
    })

    -- Add the type to the array so no duplicates are added.
    table.insert(addedTypes, cardType)

    -- Increase the Z position and return it.
    return zPosition + 0.75
end

-- Makes a character sheet uninteractable, by removing the relevant buttons.
function makeCharacterSheetUninteractable(sheet)
    -- Remove all buttons.
    for key, value in ipairs(sheet.getButtons()) do
        sheet.removeButton(key - 1)
    end
end

-- Updates the player count on the second menu.
function updateUIPlayerCount()
    local currentPlayerCount = getCurrentPlayerCount()

    -- When playing with one player, the player count is two (a main character and assist character). Otherwise, use the normal player count.
    local requiredPlayerCount = settings.playerCount > 1 and settings.playerCount or 2

    UI.setAttribute("PlayerCount", "text", "Character selection count: " .. currentPlayerCount .. "/" .. requiredPlayerCount)

    -- Enable or disable the "Continue" button on the character selection stage depending on if the player count has been reached.
    if currentPlayerCount >= requiredPlayerCount then
        UI.setAttribute("FinishCharacterSelectionButton", "interactable", true)
    else
        UI.setAttribute("FinishCharacterSelectionButton", "interactable", false)
    end
end

-- Fires when a character is selected.
function selectCharacter(sheet, player, checked)
    local characterData

    -- Check if the player doesn't already have a character selected.
    if settings.players[player] ~= nil then
        broadcastToColor("You have already selected a character. You can change your character by clicking on the \"Change Character\" button of your character's sheet. Alternatively, you can pick another character if you change your player color by switching seats on the table.", player)
        return
    end

    -- Loop through the character data to retrieve the correct one.
    local characterKey
    for key, value in ipairs(characters) do
        if value.sheetGuid == sheet.getGUID() then
            characterKey = key
            characterData = value
        end
    end

    -- Stop if the player's color is not defined in the hand positions.
    if hand_positions[player] == nil then
        broadcastToColor("Your color is not able to select characters. Please use one of the predefined colors on the sides of the table.", player)
        return
    end

    -- Stop if the character can't be selected in a regular game.
    if settings.playerCount > 1 and not canSelectCharacter(player, characterData) then
        return
    end

    -- Stop if the character can't be selected in a one player game.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 and not canSelectCharacterOnePlayer(player, characterData) then
        return
    end

    -- Remove the pick button.
    sheet.removeButton(0)

    -- Update the settings with the data.
    settings.players[player] = characterData

    -- Update the player count.
    updateUIPlayerCount()

    -- If this is the final character being selected and it's not a one player game, re-open the menu.
    if settings.playerCount > 1 and settings.playerCount == getCurrentPlayerCount() then
        resetSetupVisibility()
    end

    -- Move the character sheet to the correct position.
    local characterSheet = getObjectFromGUID(characterData.sheetGuid)
    local characterToken = getObjectFromGUID(characterData.tokenGuid)

    local rotation = getPlayerRotation(player, false) 
    characterSheet.setRotationSmooth(rotation)
    characterSheet.setLock(false)
    characterSheet.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(hand_positions[player].character_sheet))
    characterSheet.scale(1.8)
    makeCharacterSheetInteractable(characterSheet, characterData)

    -- Lock the character sheet once it's properly in place.
    Wait.condition(function()
        characterSheet.setLock(true)
    end, function()
       return characterSheet.resting 
    end)

    -- If playing a one player game and the assist character was selected, only the sheet needs to be moved. No need to go further. The setup panel should now be displayed to everyone again as well.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 and player ~= one_player_hands.main then
        resetSetupVisibility()
        onePlayerCharacterSelected()
        return
    end

    -- Move the character token to the correct position and give it the correct color.
    local characterToken = getObjectFromGUID(characterData.tokenGuid)

    -- Get the adjusted location.
    local adjustedLocation = getAdjustedMapLocation(characterData.location)

    -- Get the starting position based on the character's location.
    local tokenPosition = map_locations[adjustedLocation]

    -- Check if there's already somebody in the token position if the game hasn't started.
    local count = 0
    for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
        if getAdjustedMapLocation(value.location) == adjustedLocation and key ~= player and not settings.setupCompleted then
            -- Adjust the token's position based on the number of characters in the same location.
            count = count + 1
            tokenPosition = adjustMapLocationPosition(count, tokenPosition)
        end
    end

    -- Check if there's trauma tokens on the location and adjust accordingly. The "Allies for All Seasons" variant does not use these.
    if settings.ending == "Ionian Nebula" then
        -- If the location is one that includes a trauma token by default, add one to the count.
        if table.inTable(trauma_token_locations, adjustedLocation) then
            count = count + 1
            tokenPosition = adjustMapLocationPosition(count, tokenPosition)
        end 
    end

    -- If the character is stranded, move the character token to the character token position.
    if characterData.location == "Stranded" then
        tokenPosition = hand_positions[player].character_token
    end

    characterToken.setLock(false)
    characterToken.setRotationSmooth({ 0, 0, 0 })
    characterToken.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(tokenPosition))
    characterToken.setColorTint(player)

    -- If the character can pilot, move the character's piloting token.
    if characterData.canPilot then
        local pilotingToken = getObjectFromGUID(characterData.pilotingTokenGuid)
        local pilotingTokenPosition = hand_positions[player].piloting_token

        pilotingToken.setLock(false)
        pilotingToken.setRotationSmooth(rotation)
        pilotingToken.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(pilotingTokenPosition))

        -- Handle characters that launch in a viper.
        if characterData.location == "Viper" then
            -- Get the Viper deck.
            local viperDeck = getObjectFromGUID("8fa2fd")

            -- If there's enough Vipers in the deck, continue.
            local viperCount = #viperDeck.getObjects()
            if viperCount > 0 then
                -- Move the character token to the character token position.
                characterToken.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(hand_positions[player].character_token))
                characterToken.setRotationSmooth(getPlayerRotation(player, false))

                -- Move the piloting token to the Viper launch map location position.
                pilotingToken.setRotationSmooth({ 0, 180, 0 })
                pilotingToken.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(tokenPosition))

                -- Move the Viper to the right of the piloting token and attach it.
                local viperLocation = { tokenPosition[1] + 1.50, tokenPosition[2], tokenPosition[3] }
                viperDeck.takeObject({
                    index = 0,
                    position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(viperLocation),
                    rotation = { 0, 90, 0 },
                    callback_function = function(object) 
                        -- Attach the piloting token to the viper once they're in place.
                        Wait.condition(function()
                            attachPilotingTokenToViper(pilotingToken, object) 
                        end, function()
                            return pilotingToken.resting and object.resting
                        end)
                    end
                })
            -- Otherwise, move the character to the Hangar Deck.
            else
                local adjustedLocation = getAdjustedMapLocation("Hangar Deck")
                characterToken.setPositionSmooth(map_locations[adjustedLocation])
            end
        end
    end

    -- If in a one player game, proceed with unique character selection process.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 then
        onePlayerCharacterSelected()
    end 
end

-- Gets the the adjusted map location for a given location, in case something causes the character to be placed elsewhere.
function getAdjustedMapLocation(location)
    -- Keep track of Pegasus locations and their Galactica equivalent.
    local pegasusEquivalents = { 
        ["Pegasus CIC"] = "Command",
        ["Airlock"]  = "Admiral's Quarters",
        ["Main Batteries"]  = "Weapons Control",
        ["Engine Room"]  = "FTL Control"
    }
    -- If Pegasus is destroyed, move the character to the respective location on Galactica. 
    if settings.pegasusDestroyed and pegasusEquivalents[location] ~= nil then
        location = pegasusEquivalents[location]
    end

    -- Keep track of Presidential One locations. If their value is true, they have a separate position when Daybreak is enabled.
    local presidentialOneLocations = { 
        ["Press Room"] = true,
        ["President's Office"] = true,
        ["Administration"] = true,
        ["Quorum Chamber"] = false
    }
    -- If Colonial One is destroyed, move the character to sickbay instead.
    if settings.colonialOneDestroyed and presidentialOneLocations[location] ~= nil then
        location = "Sickbay"
    -- If Daybreak is enabled, the Presidential One locations will have changed. Adjust them accordingly.
    elseif settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled and presidentialOneLocations[location] == true then
        location = location .. " Daybreak"
    end

    return location
end

-- Adjusts a given position for a map location, depending on the number of other tokens in that position.
function adjustMapLocationPosition(numberInPosition, position)
    -- If it's in an even position, it needs to be moved down.
    if numberInPosition % 2 == 0 then
        position = { position[1] - 1.8, position[2], position[3] - 2 }
    -- If it's an uneven position, it needs to be moved right.
    else
        position = { position[1] + 1.8, position[2], position[3] }
    end

    return position
end

-- Checks if a given character can be selected.
function canSelectCharacter(player, characterData)
    -- Determine if restrictions are disabled.
    local disableRestrictions = settings.otherSettings.disableCharacterRestrictions.enabled

    -- Check if the maximum player count has been hit.
    if getCurrentPlayerCount() >= settings.playerCount then
        broadcastToColor("The maximum player count has been reached.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- If restrictions are disabled, allow anything.
    if disableRestrictions then
        return true
    end

    local roleCount = getCharacterRoleCount()

    -- If we're on the last character and no Cylon Leader has been picked, fail. For debugging, do not check this if there's only one player.
    if settings.playWithCylonLeader and count["Cylon Leader"] == 0 and settings.playerCount - 1 == getCurrentPlayerCount() and settings.playerCount > 1 and characterData.role ~= "Cylon Leader" then
        broadcastToColor("One player must play as a Cylon Leader. As you have the final pick and none have been selected, you must play as one.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- Check if a Cylon Leader has already been picked.
    if characterData.role == "Cylon Leader" and count["Cylon Leader"] >= 1 then
        broadcastToColor("A player is already playing as a Cylon Leader. There can only be one Cylon Leader.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- If an alternate version of the character has been selected, fail.
    if characterData.excludesGuid then
        -- Loop through the players and see if anyone has selected an alternate version.
        for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
            if value.sheetGuid == characterData.excludesGuid then
                broadcastToColor("A player has already picked an alternate version of this character.", player)
                return false
            end
        end
    end

    -- Check if the player count is too low to play this character.
    if settings.playerCount < characterData.minimumPlayerCount then
        broadcastToColor("This character cannot be picked with this player count. It requires at least " .. characterData.minimumPlayerCount .. " players.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- If playing with the official "No Sympathizer" variant and there's six players, do not allow certain characters to be picked.
    if settings.otherSettings.noSympathizer.enabled and settings.playerCount == 6 and characterData.disabledWithNoSympathizer then
        broadcastToColor("This character cannot be picked when playing with the \"No Sympathizer\" variant and six players.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- Determines which roles can only be played.
    local limitedRoles = { 
        "Military Leader", 
        "Political Leader",
        "Pilot"
    }

    -- Only check the role if it's in the limited table and that the game hasn't started.
    if table.inTable(limitedRoles, characterData.role) and not settings.setupCompleted then
        -- Loop through the limited roles.
        local largerThan = false
        for key, value in ipairs(limitedRoles) do
            -- If we're not dealing with the same role and the selected role has a higher count than another limited role, stop.
            if value ~= characterData.role and roleCount[characterData.role] > roleCount[value] then
                broadcastToColor("There are too many characters with this role. Select another role.", player)
                return false
            end
        end
    end

    return true
end

-- Checks if a given character can be selected in a one-player game.
function canSelectCharacterOnePlayer(player, characterData)
    -- Determine if restrictions are disabled.
    local disableRestrictions = settings.otherSettings.disableCharacterRestrictions.enabled

    -- Check if the maximum player count has been hit. The maximum is two: one main character and one assist character.
    if getCurrentPlayerCount() > 2 then
        broadcastToColor("The maximum player count has been reached.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- Only players in the main seat and assist seat may pick characters.
    if player ~= one_player_hands.main and player ~= one_player_hands.assist then
        broadcastToColor("Only players in the main character seat ('" .. one_player_hands.main .. "') or the assist character seat ('" .. one_player_hands.assist .. "') may pick characters when playing with one player.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- Make sure a main character is picked first.
    if player == one_player_hands.assist and getCurrentPlayerCount() == 0 then
        broadcastToColor("Pick a main character in the '" .. one_player_hands.main .. "' seat first.", player)
        return false
    end

    -- If restrictions are disabled, allow anything.
    if disableRestrictions then
        return true
    end

    -- If an alternate version of the character has been selected, fail.
    if characterData.excludesGuid then
        -- Loop through the players and see if anyone has selected an alternate version.
        for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
            if value.sheetGuid == characterData.excludesGuid then
                broadcastToColor("You already picked an alternate version of this character.", player)
                return false
            end
        end
    end

    -- Check if the player count is too low to play this character. Only applies when selecting the main character.
    if settings.playerCount < characterData.minimumPlayerCount and getCurrentPlayerCount() == 0 then
        broadcastToColor("This character cannot be picked as your main character.", player)
        return false
    end

    return true
end

-- Counts the number of selected characters with each role.
function getCharacterRoleCount()
    count = {
        ["Military Leader"] = 0,
        ["Political Leader"] = 0,
        ["Pilot"] = 0,
        ["Support"] = 0,
        ["Cylon Leader"] = 0
    }

    -- Loop through the players and update the roles.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
        count[value.role] = count[value.role] + 1
    end

    return count
end

-- Lets a player change their character.
function changeCharacter(sheet, player, alt_click)
    -- Get the owner of the sheet. We can't assume it's the player clicking the button, as for one player games the player can change the sheet of the assist character.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
        -- Check if it's the same player.
        if value.sheetGuid == sheet.getGUID() then
            owner = key
        end
    end

    local characterData = settings.players[owner]

    -- Check if the character sheet belongs to the player clicking on the button.
    if not canInteractWithSheet(sheet, player) then
        return
    end

    -- If in a one player game and the assist character was changed while their seat is empty, move the main player into that seat.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 and player ~= owner and getPlayerByColor(one_player_hands.assist) == nil then
        -- Get the character in the main seat.
        local mainCharacter = getPlayerByColor(one_player_hands.main)

        -- Change their color to the assist one.
        mainCharacter.changeColor(one_player_hands.assist)

        -- Inform them.
        broadcastToColor("As you are changing your assist character, you have been moved into the assist seat ('" .. one_player_hands.assist .. "').", one_player_hands.assist)
    end

    -- Make the sheet uninteractable.
    makeCharacterSheetUninteractable(sheet)

    -- Update the settings with the data.
    settings.players[owner] = nil

    -- Update the player count.
    updateUIPlayerCount()

    -- Move the sheet back.
    sheet.setLock(false)
    sheet.scale(0.56)
    sheet.setRotationSmooth({ 0, -90, 0 })
    sheet.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(characterData.sheetPosition))

    local characterToken = getObjectFromGUID(characterData.tokenGuid)

    -- Move the token back. Make sure to remove all joints in case the character is in a Viper.
    characterToken.setLock(false)
    characterToken.setRotationSmooth({ 0, -90, 0 })
    characterToken.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(characterData.tokenPosition))
    characterToken.setColorTint("White")

    -- Handle the piloting token if the character can pilot.
    local pilotingToken = getObjectFromGUID(characterData.pilotingTokenGuid)
    if characterData.canPilot then
        -- Move the piloting token back. Make sure to remove all joints in case the character is in a Viper.
        pilotingToken.jointTo()
        pilotingToken.setLock(false)
        pilotingToken.setRotationSmooth({ 0, -90, 0 })
        pilotingToken.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(characterData.pilotingTokenPosition))
    end

    -- Lock the sheet, character token and if applicable piloting token when they're in place.
    Wait.condition(function() 
        sheet.setLock(true)
        characterToken.setLock(true)

        if characterData.canPilot then
            pilotingToken.setLock(true)
        end
    end, function()
        return sheet.resting and characterToken.resting and (pilotingToken == nil or pilotingToken.resting)
    end)
    
    -- Make all sheets pickable, but reset them first.
    makeCharacterSheetsUnpickable()
    makeCharacterSheetsPickable()
end

-- Draws the cards of a character to the player's hand.
function drawCards(sheet, player, alt_click)
    local characterData = settings.players[player]

    -- Check if the character sheet belongs to the player clicking on the button.
    if not canInteractWithSheet(sheet, player) then
        return
    end

    -- Loop through the characters base draw, get the deck and deal the cards.
    for key, value in pairs(characterData.draw.base) do
        -- Get and deal the cards.
        getCardsFromSkillCardsDeck(key, value, function(deck, amount)
            if deck then 
                deck.deal(amount, player)
            end
        end)
    end
end

-- Draws the chosen card of a character to the player's hand.
function drawCard(sheet, player, alt_click, cardType)
    local characterData = settings.players[player]

    -- Check if the character sheet belongs to the player clicking on the button.
    if not canInteractWithSheet(sheet, player) then
        return
    end

    -- Get and deal the cards.
    getCardsFromSkillCardsDeck(cardType, 1, function(deck, amount)
        if deck then 
            deck.deal(amount, player)
        end
    end)
end

-- Checks if a character can interact with a given sheet.
function canInteractWithSheet(sheet, player)
    local characterData = settings.players[player]

    -- If in a one player game, the main character may interact with any sheet.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 and player == one_player_hands.main then
       return true
    end

    -- Check if the character sheet belongs to the player clicking on the button otherwise.
    if not characterData or sheet.getGUID() ~= characterData.sheetGuid then
        broadcastToColor("This character sheet is not yours.", player)
        return false
    end

    return true
end
