-- Used when cards from one of the skill card decks must be dealt or moved somewhere. Calls the callback function, which can then handle dealing or moving the card. If there are insufficient cards in the skill card deck, it is automatically rebuilt and shuffled after the remaining cards have been passed to the callback function.
function getCardsFromSkillCardsDeck(type, amount, callback)
    local zone = getObjectFromGUID(decks[string.lower(type)].guid)
    local deck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(zone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

    local ready = deck and true or false
    local neededAmount = amount

    -- If there's no deck at all, rebuild and shuffle it.
    if not ready then 
        rebuildSkillCardsDeck(type, function(newDeck)
            deck = newDeck
            ready = true
        end)
    end

    -- Wait until there's actually a deck or single card present.
    Wait.condition(function()
        -- If the "deck" is a card, set the quantity to 1. Otherwise, use the quantity of the actual deck.
        local quantity = 0
        if deck then
            quantity = deck.type == "Card" and 1 or deck.getQuantity()
        -- However, if no deck was returned at all, the skill card deck could not be rebuilt. Return nothing.
        else
            callback(nil, 0)
            return
        end

        -- If there's not enough cards in the deck, but there are some, call the callback with the current number of cards, then rebuild the skill cards deck. That ensures the deck is emptied before it's rebuilt.
        if quantity < amount then
            -- Ensure the callback removes the remaining cards from the deck and update the number of cards that still need to be sent to the callback.
            neededAmount = neededAmount - quantity
            callback(deck, quantity)
    
            -- Wait until the deck is now empty, meaning the callback is done.
            Wait.condition(function()
                -- Rebuild the skill deck, then pass the new deck to the callback.
                rebuildSkillCardsDeck(type, function(newDeck)
                    deck = newDeck

                    -- If at this point we do not have a deck, the rebuilding of the skill card deck failed at this point. Return zero cards.
                    if not deck then 
                        neededAmount = 0
                    end

                    callback(deck, neededAmount)
                end)          
            end, function()
                return #zone.getObjects() == 0
            end)
        -- Otherwise, the deck is ready to go.
        else
            callback(deck, neededAmount)
        end
    end, function()
        return ready == true
    end)
end

-- Rebuilds a skill cards deck by taking the discard deck, moving it into the regular deck position and shuffling it.
function rebuildSkillCardsDeck(type, callback)
    local cardZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks[string.lower(type)].guid)
    local discardZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.discard[string.lower(type)].guid)
    local discardDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(discardZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

    -- Check if the discard zone is empty and return, but only warn if the skill card deck is also empty.
    if not discardDeck then
        if not getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(cardZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true) then
            broadcastToAll("Unable to automatically rebuild the " .. type .. " deck, as the deck's discard pile does not contain enough cards. Double check the skill card draw or Destiny deck and manually include the " .. type .. " cards.")
        end
        callback(nil)
        return
    end

    -- Take the cards from the discard zone, and move them into the regular zone.
    discardDeck.setRotationSmooth({ 180, 0, 0 })
    discardDeck.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks[string.lower(type)].position))

    -- Wait until the deck is rebuilt.
    Wait.condition(function()
        local deck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(cardZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)
        deck.shuffle()

        callback(deck)
    end, function()
        local deck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(cardZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)
        return deck ~= nil
    end)
end

    UI.setAttribute("DealingStageButton", "text", "Working...")

    if settings.ending == "Ionian Nebula" or settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.alliesForAllSeasons.enabled then

-- Sets up the allies on the board.
function setupAllies()
    -- Get the decks.
    local allyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.allies.guid), { "Deck" }, true) 
    local traumaTokenDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.trauma_tokens.guid), { "Deck" }, true) 

    -- Keep track of the number of removed allies.
    local removeCount = 0

    -- Keep track of the removed allies. If character restrictions are disabled and there's two versions of the same character, it needs only be removed once.
    local removedAllies = {}

    -- Remove the allies and ally tokens from their stack if a player is playing them.
    for key, value in ipairs(allies) do
        -- Loop through the stack of allies to see if any match.
        for playerKey, playerValue in pairs(settings.players) do
            -- Check if there's a matching character and if it hasn't been removed already.
            if table.inTable(value.sheetGuids, playerValue.sheetGuid) and not table.inTable(removedAllies, value.cardGuid) then
                allyDeck.takeObject({
                    guid = value.cardGuid,
                    position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks.discard.allies.position),
                    rotation = { 0, -90, 0 }
                })

                -- Move the token into the discard pile. Increase the height for each token removed.
                local allyTokenDiscard = decks.discard.ally_tokens.position
                local token = getObjectFromGUID(value.tokenGuid)

                token.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck({ allyTokenDiscard[1], allyTokenDiscard[2] + 0.1 * removeCount, allyTokenDiscard[3] }))

                -- Increment the remove count.
                removeCount = removeCount + 1

                -- Add the ally to the removed allies table.
                table.insert(removedAllies, value.cardGuid)
            end
        end
    end

    -- The position for the ally cards.
    local allyCardPositions = { 
        { 51.05, 1.77, -11.85},
        { 51.05, 1.77, -16.85 },
        { 51.05, 1.77, -21.85 }
     }

    -- The position for the trauma tokens.
    local traumaTokenPositions = { 
        { 53.80, 1.77, -11.85 },
        { 53.80, 1.77, -16.85 },
        { 53.80, 1.77, -21.85 }
    }

    -- Add three allies to the board. Each ally receives a trauma token on their card, unless the "Allies for All Seasons" variant is enabled.
    for i = 1, 3, 1 do
        -- Move the ally card.
        local allyCard = allyDeck.takeObject({
            index = 0,
            position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(allyCardPositions[i]),
            rotation = { 0, -90, 0 }
        })

        -- Move the trauma token if the "Allies for All Seasons" variant is disabled.
        if not settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.alliesForAllSeasons.enabled then
            traumaTokenDeck.takeObject({
                index = 0,
                position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(traumaTokenPositions[i])
            })
        end

        -- Get the ally data.
        local allyData
        for key, value in ipairs(allies) do
            if value.cardGuid == allyCard.getGUID() then
                allyData = value
            end
        end

        -- Get the ally token.
        local allyToken = getObjectFromGUID(allyData.tokenGuid)

        -- Get the adjusted location.
        local adjustedLocation = getAdjustedMapLocation(allyData.location)

        -- Get the starting position based on the ally's location.
        local tokenPosition = map_locations[adjustedLocation]

        -- Check if there's already a player in the token position.
        local count = 0
        for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
            if getAdjustedMapLocation(value.location) == adjustedLocation then
                -- Adjust the token's position based on the number of player characters in the same location.
                count = count + 1
                tokenPosition = adjustMapLocationPosition(count, tokenPosition)
            end
        end

        -- Check if there's already an ally in the token position.
        for key, value in pairs(active_allies) do
            if getAdjustedMapLocation(value.location) == adjustedLocation then
                -- Adjust the token's position based on the number of ally characters in the same location.
                count = count + 1
                tokenPosition = adjustMapLocationPosition(count, tokenPosition)
            end
        end

        -- If the "Allies for All Seasons" variant is disabled, and the location is one that includes a trauma token by default, add one to the count.
        if not settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.alliesForAllSeasons.enabled and table.inTable(trauma_token_locations, adjustedLocation) then
            count = count + 1
            tokenPosition = adjustMapLocationPosition(count, tokenPosition)
        end 

        -- Add the ally to the active ally table.
        table.insert(active_allies, allyData)

        -- Set the ally token's position.
        allyToken.setRotationSmooth({ 0, 180, 0 })
        allyToken.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(tokenPosition))
    end
end

-- Deals the title cards, title objects and other player objects.
function dealTitleCardsAndObjects()
    -- Deal the Title cards and other objects.
    succession = getLinesOfSuccession()

    -- Get the Miracle token stack.
    local miracleTokenStack = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.miracle_tokens.guid), { "Tile" }, true)

    -- Loop through the players and deal all relevant objects.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
        -- Only take these actions if Daybreak is enabled.
        if settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
            -- Give each player a Miracle token.
            miracleTokenStack.takeObject({
                position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(hand_positions[key].miracle_tokens)
            })

            -- Deal the player a Mutiny card if applicable.
            if value.dealMutinyCard then
                local mutinyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.mutiny.guid), { "Deck" }, true)
                mutinyDeck.deal(1, key)
            end
        end

        -- Give the Cylon Leader their objects.
        if value.role == "Cylon Leader" then
            -- Deal the Infiltration Reference.
            local infiltrationReference = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.infiltration_reference.guid), { "Card" }, true)
            infiltrationReference.deal(1, key)

            -- Move the Agenda/Motive deck. Currently not used, as it remains in its original position as the Agenda/Motive cards are automatically dealt.
            -- local agendaMotiveDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.agenda_motive.guid), { "Deck" }, true)
            -- agendaMotiveDeck.setRotationSmooth(getPlayerRotation(key, true))
            -- agendaMotiveDeck.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(hand_positions[key].extra_cards))
        -- Otherwise, handle the titles.
        else
            -- If the current player is first in line for Admiral.
            if succession["Admiral"][1].color == key then
                local endingCard = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.ending.guid), { "Card" }, true)
                local admiralToken = getObjectFromGUID("f820b8")
                local admiralCard = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.admiral.guid), { "Card" }, true)
                local nukes = { "2f951c", "3eac5b" }

                -- When playing a fully cooperative game or with one player, remove the second nuke.
                if settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled or settings.playerCount == 1 then
                    table.remove(nukes, 2)
                end

                -- Deal the Ending card.
                endingCard.deal(1, key)

                -- Move the Admiral token.
                admiralToken.setRotationSmooth(getPlayerRotation(key, false))
                admiralToken.setPositionSmooth(hand_positions[key].admiral_token)

                -- Deal the Admiral card.
                admiralCard.scale(1.15)
                admiralCard.deal(1, key)

                -- Add the nukes.
                for i = 1, #nukes, 1 do
                    getObjectFromGUID(nukes[i]).setRotationSmooth(getPlayerRotation(key, false))
                    getObjectFromGUID(nukes[i]).setPositionSmooth(hand_positions[key]["nuke_" .. i])
                end
            end

            -- If the current player is first in line for President.
            if succession["President"][1].color == key then
                local presidentToken = getObjectFromGUID("8c294e")
                local presidentCard = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.president.guid), { "Card" }, true)
                local quorumDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.quorum.guid), { "Deck" }, true)

                -- Move the President token.
                presidentToken.setRotationSmooth(getPlayerRotation(key, false))
                presidentToken.setPositionSmooth(hand_positions[key].president_token)

                -- Deal the President card.
                presidentCard.scale(1.15)
                presidentCard.deal(1, key)

                -- Deal a Quorum card and move the Quorum deck.
                quorumDeck.deal(1, key)
                quorumDeck.setRotationSmooth(getPlayerRotation(key, true))
                quorumDeck.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(hand_positions[key].extra_cards))               
            end

            -- If the the Cylon Fleet Board is enabled and the current player is first in line for CAG.
            if settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.cylonFleetBoard.enabled and succession["CAG"][1].color == key then
                local cagToken = getObjectFromGUID("c0e8db")
                local cagCard = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.cag.guid), { "Card" }, true)

                -- Move the CAG token.
                cagToken.setRotationSmooth(getPlayerRotation(key, false))
                cagToken.setPositionSmooth(hand_positions[key].cag_token)

                -- Deal the CAG card.
                cagCard.scale(1.15)
                cagCard.deal(1, key)
            end
        end

        -- If the ending is the Ionian Nebula or if the "Allies for All Seasons" variant is enabled, deal trauma tokens to all players.
        if settings.ending == "Ionian Nebula" or settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.alliesForAllSeasons.enabled then
            -- Get the Trauma token stack.
            local traumaTokenStack = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.trauma_tokens.guid), { "Deck" }, false)

            --- Keep track of the tokens given to the player.
            local tokensGiven = 0

            -- Determine how many trauma tokens are dealt. Three with the Ionian Nebula ending and four with the "Allies for All Seasons" variant
            local traumaTokenCount = settings.ending == "Ionian Nebula" and 3 or 4

            -- Deal three trauma tokens.
            while tokensGiven < traumaTokenCount do
                -- If the top token is a disaster token, reshuffle.
                local topToken = traumaTokenStack.getObjects()[1]
                if topToken.name == "Disaster Trauma Token" then
                    traumaTokenStack.shuffle()
                -- Otherwise, deal a Trauma token.
                else
                    traumaTokenStack.deal(1, key)
                    tokensGiven = tokensGiven + 1
                end
            end
        end
    end

    openNextSetupPanel()
end

-- Builds the Loyalty deck and deals the Loyalty cards.
function buildAndDealLoyaltyCards()
    local humanCardCount = 0
    local cylonCardCount = 0
    
    -- Determines if no Loyalty deck should be built at all.
    local buildLoyaltyDeck = true

    -- Determines if a player count card (Sympathetic Cylon, Sympathizer, Mutineer) should be included.
    local playerCountCard = false

    -- Set the values based on the player count.
    if settings.playerCount == 1 then
        humanCardCount = 6
        cylonCardCount = 1
    elseif settings.playerCount == 2 then 
        -- The two player variant doesn't use the Loyalty deck until the start of the Sleeper phase.
        buildLoyaltyDeck = false
        playerCountCard = false
        humanCardCount = 0
        cylonCardCount = 0
    elseif settings.playerCount == 3 then
        humanCardCount = 5
        cylonCardCount = 1       
    elseif settings.playerCount == 4 then
        humanCardCount = settings.playWithCylonLeader and 5 or 6
        cylonCardCount = 1

        -- Sympathizer/Sympathetic Cylon/Mutineer is enabled with four players, and no Cylon Leader enabled.
        if not settings.playWithCylonLeader then
            playerCountCard = true
        end
    elseif settings.playerCount == 5 then
        humanCardCount = settings.playWithCylonLeader and 7 or 8
        cylonCardCount = settings.playWithCylonLeader and 1 or 2

        -- Mutineer is enabled with five players, with a Cylon Leader and Daybreak enabled.
        if settings.playWithCylonLeader and settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
            playerCountCard = true
        end
    elseif settings.playerCount == 6 then
        humanCardCount = settings.playWithCylonLeader and 8 or 9
        cylonCardCount = 2

        -- Sympathizer/Sympathetic Cylon/Mutineer is enabled with six players, and no Cylon Leader.
        if not settings.playWithCylonLeader then
            playerCountCard = true
        end
    elseif settings.playerCount == 7 then
        humanCardCount = 10
        cylonCardCount = 2

        -- Mutineer is enabled with seven players, with a Cylon Leader and Daybreak enabled.
        if settings.playWithCylonLeader and settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
            playerCountCard = true
        end
    end

    -- Do not build the Loyalty deck when playing a fully cooperative game.
    if settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled then
        buildLoyaltyDeck = false
        playerCountCard = false
        humanCardCount = 0
        cylonCardCount = 0
    end

    -- Only continue if the Loyalty deck should actually be built and there's more than one player.
    if buildLoyaltyDeck and settings.playerCount > 1 then
        -- Add one extra non-Cylon card for certain characters.
        for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
            if value.addExtraLoyaltyCard then
                humanCardCount = humanCardCount + 1   
            end
        end
        
        -- Add one extra non-Cylon card if Exodus is enabled.
        if settings.expansions.exodus.enabled then
            humanCardCount = humanCardCount + 1
        end

        -- Add one extra non-Cylon card when Daybreak is enabled, when playing with a Mutineer, and when not playing with a Cylon Leader.
        -- The reason for this is that the Mutineer requires you to draw a new loyalty card, increasing the total draw by one. 
        -- This extra non-Cylon card is already present in the standard rules when not playing with the Sympathizer/Sympathetic Cylon (namely with five players or a Cylon Leader being present), but there are cases where the Mutineer is enabled when the Sympathizer/Sympathetic Cylon would not be, requiring an extra card.
        if settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled and playerCountCard and not settings.playWithCylonLeader then
            humanCardCount = humanCardCount + 1
        end

        -- If playing with the official "No Sympathizer" variant, disable the player count card and add one Human Loyalty card.
        if settings.otherSettings.noSympathizer.enabled then
            humanCardCount = humanCardCount + 1
            playerCountCard = false
        end
    end

    -- Get the decks.
    local humanLoyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.human_loyalty.guid), { "Deck" }, true) 
    local cylonLoyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.cylon_loyalty.guid), { "Deck" }, true) 
    local loyaltyDeckPosition = adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks.loyalty.position)
    
    -- Warn if there are not enough Human Loyalty cards and reduce the required count.
    if humanLoyaltyDeck.getQuantity() < humanCardCount then
        local reduction = humanCardCount - humanLoyaltyDeck.getQuantity()
        broadcastToAll("Warning: There are insufficient Human Loyalty cards in the deck to build the expected Loyalty deck. Reducing the number of required Human Loyalty cards by \"" .. reduction .. "\". This may cause issues during the Sleeper Agent phase.")

        humanCardCount = humanLoyaltyDeck.getQuantity()
    end

    -- Create the loyalty deck. Scale up the cards so they fit.
    -- Add the non-Cylon cards.
    for i = 1, humanCardCount, 1 do 
        local card = humanLoyaltyDeck.takeObject({
            index = 0,
            position = loyaltyDeckPosition,
            rotation = { 180, 0, 0 },
            callback_function = function(object)
                -- Unlock the card once it's in position.
                object.setLock(false)
            end
        })

        -- Lock the card so it doesn't move into the hand on the side of the table. Scale it up as well to fit in its area.
        card.setLock(true)
        card.scale(1.25)
    end

    -- Add the Cylon cards.
    for i = 1, cylonCardCount, 1 do 
        local card = cylonLoyaltyDeck.takeObject({
            index = 0,
            position = loyaltyDeckPosition,
            rotation = { 180, 0, 0 },
            callback_function = function(object)
                -- Unlock the card once it's in position.
                object.setLock(false)
            end
        })

        -- Lock the card so it doesn't move into the hand on the side of the table. Scale it up as well to fit in its area.
        card.setLock(true)
        card.scale(1.25)
    end

    -- Determine the total number of cards in the Loyalty deck.
    local totalCount = humanCardCount + cylonCardCount

    -- Add the Mutineer card, if the Loyalty deck is being built, if Daybreak is enabled and the necessary player count is hit. It must be added before the Loyalty deck is dealt.
    if buildLoyaltyDeck and playerCountCard and settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
        addPlayerCountCardToLoyaltyDeck()
        totalCount = totalCount + 1
    end

    -- Wait until the Loyalty deck has been built and is in place before continuing.
    Wait.condition(function()
        dealLoyaltyCards(playerCountCard, buildLoyaltyDeck)
    end, function()
        local loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.loyalty.guid), { "Deck" }, true)

        -- Make sure the Loyalty deck is actually present, unless the deck is not being built. If it is present, check if it has the required number of cards.
        return buildLoyaltyDeck == false or (loyaltyDeck ~= nil and loyaltyDeck.getQuantity() == totalCount)
    end)
end

-- Adds the player count card to the Loyalty Deck.
function addPlayerCountCardToLoyaltyDeck()
    local playerCountLoyaltyCard = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.player_count_loyalty.guid), { "Card" }, true)
    local loyaltyDeckPosition = adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks.loyalty.position)

    playerCountLoyaltyCard.setPositionSmooth(loyaltyDeckPosition)
    playerCountLoyaltyCard.setRotationSmooth({ 180, 0, 0 })
    playerCountLoyaltyCard.scale(1.25)
    
    -- Lock the player count card so it doesn't end up in the side hand.
    playerCountLoyaltyCard.setLock(true)

    -- When the player count card is in position, unlock it.
    Wait.condition(function()
        playerCountLoyaltyCard.setLock(false)
    end, function()
        return playerCountLoyaltyCard.resting  
    end)

    return playerCountLoyaltyCard
end

-- Shuffles the Loyalty cards deck and deals it. Also handles adding the Sympathizer/Sympathetic Cylon cards if applicable.
function dealLoyaltyCards(playerCountCard, buildLoyaltyDeck)
    -- Get the Loyalty deck and shuffle it, if it exists.
    local loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.loyalty.guid), { "Deck" }, true)

    -- Only shuffle if the Loyalty deck was built.
    if buildLoyaltyDeck then
        loyaltyDeck.shuffle()
    end

    -- Deal to each player.
    for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
        -- If it's a regular game, continue normally.
        if settings.playerCount > 1 then
            -- Do not deal Loyalty cards to Cylon Leaders and deal an extra card to character if set.
            if value.role ~= "Cylon Leader" then
                -- Only deal if the Loyalty deck was built.
                if buildLoyaltyDeck then
                    loyaltyDeck.deal(value.dealExtraLoyaltyCard and 2 or 1, key)
                end
            -- Deal the Agenda/Motive cards to the Cylon Leader if applicable.
            else
                -- Get the Agenda/Motive deck.
                local agendaMotiveDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.agenda_motive.guid), { "Deck" }, true)

                -- Normally, deal one Agenda card.
                local cardCount = 1

                -- If Daybreak or the "Use Motive Deck" variant is enabled, deal two Motive cards.
                if settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled or settings.otherSettings.useMotiveDeck.enabled then
                    cardCount = 2
                end

                -- Deal the card(s) from the deck.
                agendaMotiveDeck.deal(cardCount, key)
            end
        -- If it's a one player game, deal three loyalty cards to the assist character.
        else
            -- If it's the assist character, deal three cards.
            if key == one_player_hands.assist then
                loyaltyDeck.deal(3, key)
            end
        end
    end

    -- Add the Sympathizer/Sympathetic Cylon cards if the Loyalty deck is being built, Daybreak is disabled and the necessary player count is hit.
    if buildLoyaltyDeck and playerCountCard and not settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
        playerCountLoyaltyCard = addPlayerCountCardToLoyaltyDeck()

        -- Wait until the card has been added, then shuffle the deck.
        Wait.condition(function()
            loyaltyDeck.shuffle()
        end, function()
            return playerCountLoyaltyCard == nil
        end)
    end

    -- Deal the title cards and other player objects.
    dealTitleCardsAndObjects()
end

-- Gets the lines of succession, based on the current players and their characters.
function getLinesOfSuccession()
    local successionTable = {
        Admiral = {},
        President = {}
    }

    -- Add the CAG role if the Cylon Fleet Board is enabled.
    if settings.expansions.exodus.additionalSettings.cylonFleetBoard.enabled then
        successionTable["CAG"] = {}
    end

    -- Loop through the succession table so we get each role. Not very efficient, but there's never a lot of data in the succession table.
    for key, value in pairs(successionTable) do
        -- Add the stripped down player table to the role's succession table.
        for playerKey, playerValue in pairs(settings.players) do
            -- Only continue if they're not a Cylon Leader, and in case of a one player game if they're not the assist character.
            if playerValue.role ~= "Cylon Leader" and (settings.playerCount > 1 or playerKey ~= one_player_hands.assist) then
                table.insert(successionTable[key], {
                    name = playerValue.name,
                    sheetGuid = playerValue.sheetGuid,
                    color = playerKey
                })
            end
        end

        -- Sort the role's succession table by comparing the index of their sheet GUID value in the lines of succession table.
        successionTable[key] = table.sort(successionTable[key], function(a, b)
            local aIndex = table.indexOf(lines_of_succession[string.lower(key)], a.sheetGuid)
            local bIndex = table.indexOf(lines_of_succession[string.lower(key)], b.sheetGuid)

            return aIndex < bIndex
        end)
    end

    return successionTable
end

-- Fires when the "Show Lines of Succession" button is clicked.
function showLinesOfSuccession(player, elementId)
    -- Get the lines of succession.
    local linesOfSuccession = getLinesOfSuccession()

    -- The text that will be broadcasted to the player.
    local toPrint = "\n"

    -- Loop through the lines.
    local count = 1
    for key, value in pairs(linesOfSuccession) do
        toPrint = toPrint .. "===== " .. key .. " =====\n"

        local playerCount = 1
        for playerKey, playerValue in ipairs(value) do
            toPrint = toPrint .. playerCount .. ": " .. playerValue.name

            -- If we're not on the last player, add a newline.
            if playerCount < #linesOfSuccession[key] then
                toPrint = toPrint .. "\n"
            end

            playerCount = playerCount + 1
        end

        toPrint = toPrint

        -- If we're not on the last item, add a newline.
        if count < table.length(linesOfSuccession) then
            toPrint = toPrint .. "\n"
        end

        count = count + 1
    end

    printToColor(toPrint, player.color) 
end

-- Fires when the character selection stage continue button is clicked. Moves the to the next setup stage.
function finishCharacterSelection(player, elementId, alt_click)
    -- Disable the button and change its text.
    UI.setAttribute("FinishCharacterSelectionButton", "interactable", false)
    UI.setAttribute("FinishCharacterSelectionButton", "text", "Working...")

    openNextSetupPanel()
end

-- Fires when the complete setup button is clicked. Handles completing the setup.
function completeSetup(player, elementId, alt_click)
    -- Disable the button and change its text.
    UI.setAttribute("CompleteSetupButton", "interactable", false)
    UI.setAttribute("CompleteSetupButton", "text", "Working...")

    openNextSetupPanel()

    -- Show the game buttons in the side menu.
    showSideMenuGameButtons()
end

-- Fires when the "Start Sleeper Agent Phase" button is clicked.
function startSleeperAgentPhase(player, elementId)
    -- Check if the button is waiting for confirmation.
    local confirming = UI.getAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "confirming") == "true"

    -- If not, wait for confirmation.
    if not confirming then
        UI.setAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "confirming", "true")
        UI.setAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "text", "Click Again to Confirm")

        -- Wait for confirmation. After a while, revert the button to its normal state.
        Wait.time(function()
            confirming = UI.getAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "confirming") == "true"

            if confirming then
                UI.setAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "confirming", "false")
                UI.setAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "text", "Start Sleeper Agent Phase")
            end
        end, 5)
    -- Otherwise, start the phase.
    else
        -- Update the setting.
        settings.sleeperAgentPhaseStarted = true

        -- Disable the Sleeper Agent phase button and reset it.
        UI.setAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "active", false)
        UI.setAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "confirming", "false")
        UI.setAttribute("StartSleeperAgentPhaseButton", "text", "Start Sleeper Agent Phase")

        -- Reduce the height of the side menu to fit one button.
        UI.setAttribute("BsgSideMenu", "height", 50)

        -- Show the Sleeper Agent phase menu.
        UI.setAttribute("SleeperAgentPhase", "active", true)

        -- If Pegasus or Daybreak are enabled, use a different Cylon explanation text and decrease the size of the window.
        if settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled or settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
            UI.setAttribute("SleeperPhaseDefaultCylonText", "active", false)
            UI.setAttribute("SleeperPhasePegasusDaybreakCylonText", "active", true)
            UI.setAttribute("SleeperAgentPhase", "height", 470)
        end

        -- If Exodus is enabled, use a different Boomer explanation text.
        if settings.expansions.exodus.enabled then
            UI.setAttribute("SleeperPhaseBoomerDefaultText", "active", false)
            UI.setAttribute("SleeperPhaseBoomerExodusText", "active", true)
        end

        -- Deal the Sleeper Agent phase Loyalty cards.
        dealSleeperAgentPhaseLoyaltyCards()
    end
end

-- Deals the Loyalty cards for the Sleeper Agent phase.
function dealSleeperAgentPhaseLoyaltyCards()
    -- If it's a cooperative game, do not deal any cards.
    if settings.otherSettings.fullyCooperativeGame.enabled then
        return
    end

    local loyaltyDeckZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.loyalty.guid)
    local loyaltyDeckPosition = adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks.loyalty.position)
    local humanLoyaltyDeckZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.human_loyalty.guid)
    local cylonLoyaltyDeckZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.cylon_loyalty.guid)

    -- If not dealing with a one or two player game, follow the normal rules.
    if settings.playerCount > 2 then
        local loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

        -- If the Loyalty deck is missing, inform the players.
        if loyaltyDeck == nil then 
            broadcastToAll("Unable to deal Loyalty cards to players, as the Loyalty deck could not be found. Ensure each player receives their Loyalty card(s).")
        end

        -- Loop through each player.
        for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
            -- Do not deal Loyalty cards to Cylon Leaders.
            if value.role ~= "Cylon Leader" then
                local loyaltyCardCount = 1

                -- Check if the character receives an extra card during the Sleeper Phase. The Exodus rules determine that a player (specifically, Boomer) does not receive an extra card if they've already revealed as a Cylon. As we can't check that, we'll tell the player to manually draw a second Loyalty card instead.
                if value.dealExtraLoyaltyCardInSleeperPhase and not settings.expansions.exodus.enabled then
                    loyaltyCardCount = 2
                end

                -- Ensure the Loyalty deck is present, then deal the cards.
                if loyaltyDeck then 
                    loyaltyDeck.deal(loyaltyCardCount, key)
                end
            -- Deal two Motive cards to the Cylon Leader. Agenda cards are not dealt, as such we check if Daybreak or the "Use Motive Deck" variant is enabled.
            elseif settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled or settings.otherSettings.useMotiveDeck.enabled then
                -- Get the Agenda/Motive deck. 
                local agendaMotiveDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(getObjectFromGUID(decks.agenda_motive.guid), { "Deck" }, true)

                -- If it couldn't be found, it may have been moved. Try to locate it by its GUID.
                if agendaMotiveDeck == nil then
                    agendaMotiveDeck = getObjectFromGUID("951ff0")
                end

                -- If the Motive deck is still missing, inform the players.
                if agendaMotiveDeck == nil then 
                    broadcastToAll("Unable to deal two Motive cards to the Cylon Leader player, as the Motive deck could not be found. Ensure the Cylon Leader player receives two Motive cards.")
                else
                    -- Deal the cards from the deck.
                    agendaMotiveDeck.deal(2, key)
                end
            end
        end

        -- If Daybreak is enabled, check if the Mutineer card is still in the Loyalty deck.
        if settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then    
            -- Wait until the Loyalty cards have been dealt.
            Wait.condition(function()
                local loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)
                local showMutineerText = false

                -- Check if the Loyalty deck is an actual deck.
                if loyaltyDeck and loyaltyDeck.type == "Deck" then
                    -- Loop through the deck and see if the Mutineer is still present.
                    for cardKey, cardValue in pairs(loyaltyDeck.getObjects()) do
                        -- Check if the Mutineer card is present.
                        if cardValue.name == "You Are The Mutineer" then
                            showMutineerText = true
                        end
                    end
                -- Otherwise, check if there's just one card in the Loyalty deck.
                elseif loyaltyDeck and loyaltyDeck.type == "Card" then
                    -- Check if it's the Mutineer card.
                    if loyaltyDeck.getName() == "You Are The Mutineer" then
                        showMutineerText = true
                    end
                end

                -- If necessary, show the explanation text for the Mutineer card, and increase the height of the window.
                if showMutineerText then 
                    local currentHeight = tonumber(UI.getAttribute("SleeperAgentPhase", "height"))
                    UI.setAttribute("SleeperAgentPhase", "height", currentHeight + 110)
                    UI.setAttribute("SleeperPhaseMutineerText", "active", true)
                end
            end, function()
                local loyaltyDeckCards = getObjectsOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

                -- Check that the Loyalty deck is empty or contains one resting card/deck.
                return loyaltyDeckCards == 0 or #loyaltyDeckCards == 1
            end)
        end

    -- If it's a two player game, construct the Loyalty deck, and deal each player one card.
    elseif settings.playerCount == 2 then
        -- Disable the button to complete the Sleeper Agent phase.
        disableCompleteSleeperAgentPhaseButton()

        local inTheRed = getResourcesInRedCount()
        local humanLoyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(humanLoyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true) 
        local cylonLoyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(cylonLoyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

        -- Add one Cylon card.
        local cylonCard = cylonLoyaltyDeck.takeObject({
            index = 0,
            position = loyaltyDeckPosition,
            rotation = { 180, 0, 0 },
            callback_function = function(object)
                -- Unlock the card once it's in position.
                object.setLock(false)
            end
        })

        -- Lock the card so it doesn't move into the hand on the side of the table. Scale it up as well to fit in its area.
        cylonCard.setLock(true)
        cylonCard.scale(1.25)

        -- Add two non-Cylon Loyalty cards by default, plus one for each resource in the red.
        for i = 1, 2 + inTheRed, 1 do 
            local card = humanLoyaltyDeck.takeObject({
                index = 0,
                position = loyaltyDeckPosition,
                rotation = { 180, 0, 0 },
                callback_function = function(object)
                    -- Unlock the card once it's in position.
                    object.setLock(false)
                end
            })

            -- Lock the card so it doesn't move into the hand on the side of the table. Scale it up as well to fit in its area.
            card.setLock(true)
            card.scale(1.25)
        end

        -- Wait until the Loyalty deck has been built and is in place before continuing.
        Wait.condition(function()
            local loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)
            loyaltyDeck.shuffle()

            -- Loop through each player.
            for key, value in pairs(settings.players) do
                -- Do not deal Loyalty cards to Cylon Leaders.
                if value.role ~= "Cylon Leader" then
                    loyaltyDeck.deal(1, key)
                end

                -- Re-enable the button to complete the Sleeper Agent phase.
                enableCompleteSleeperAgentPhaseButton()
            end

        end, function()
            local loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

            -- Make sure the Loyalty deck is actually present. If it is present and resting, check if it has the required number of cards (one Cylon card, two non-Cylon cards and any additional non-Cylon cards)
            return loyaltyDeck ~= nil and loyaltyDeck.getQuantity() == 3 + inTheRed
        end)

    -- If it's a one player game, add one "Not a Cylon" Loyalty card for each resource in the red and deal four cards to the assist player.
    elseif settings.playerCount == 1 then
        -- Disable the button to complete the Sleeper Agent phase.
        disableCompleteSleeperAgentPhaseButton()

        local inTheRed = getResourcesInRedCount()
        local humanLoyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(humanLoyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true) 
        local loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

        -- If the Loyalty deck is missing, inform the player.
        if loyaltyDeck == nil then 
            broadcastToAll("Unable to deal Loyalty cards to the assist player, as the Loyalty deck could not be found. Ensure the assist player receives their Loyalty cards.")
            enableCompleteSleeperAgentPhaseButton()
            return
        end

        -- Add one non-Cylon card for each resource in the red.
        for i = 1, inTheRed, 1 do 
            local card = humanLoyaltyDeck.takeObject({
                index = 0,
                position = loyaltyDeckPosition,
                rotation = { 180, 0, 0 },
                callback_function = function(object)
                    -- Unlock the card once it's in position.
                    object.setLock(false)
                end
            })

            -- Lock the card so it doesn't move into the hand on the side of the table. Scale it up as well to fit in its area.
            card.setLock(true)
            card.scale(1.25)
        end

        -- Wait until we can start dealing, then deal the assist character four Loyalty cards.
        Wait.condition(function()
            loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

            -- Shuffle the Loyalty deck if one or more cards were added.
            if inTheRed > 0 then
                loyaltyDeck.shuffle()
            end

            -- Wait until the Loyalty deck is resting, then deal four cards to the assist player.
            loyaltyDeck.deal(4, one_player_hands.assist)

            -- Re-enable the button to complete the Sleeper Agent phase.
            enableCompleteSleeperAgentPhaseButton()
        end, function()
            loyaltyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(loyaltyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

            -- Wait until there's one object in the Loyalty deck area and the Loyalty cards are in the deck (four plus the number of resources in the red).
            return loyaltyDeck ~= nil and loyaltyDeck.getQuantity() == 4 + inTheRed
        end)
    end
end

-- Returns how many resources are currently in the red.
function getResourcesInRedCount()
    -- The tracker GUIDs: fuel, food, morale, and population.
    local trackers = { "cced8c", "949029", "f3697c", "5e3ae1"}
    local inTheRed = 0

    -- Loop through the trackers, check if they're in the red, and increment the counter.
    for key, value in ipairs(trackers) do
        local tracker = getObjectFromGUID(value)
        if tracker.call("isInTheRed") == true then
            inTheRed = inTheRed + 1
        end
    end

    return inTheRed
end

-- Sets the active status of a button on the board.

-- Fires when the "Destroy/Repair" button for the Pegasus is clicked.
function repairDestroyPegasus(object, player, alt_click)
    -- Get the board.
    local board = getObjectFromGUID("437cd7")

    -- Get the button data.
    local buttonIdentifier = "repairDestroyPegasus"
    local button = getBoardButton(buttonIdentifier)
    local buttonIndex = button.index
    local buttonActive = button.active

    -- If the button is active, stop. Otherwise, mark it as active.
    if buttonActive then
        return
    end
    setBoardButtonActiveStatus(buttonIdentifier, true)

    -- Get the box, as well as the Pegasus board and damage token GUIDs.
    local pegasusBox = getObjectFromGUID("6bdbf9")
    local pegasusBoardGuid = "b8013e"
    local damageTokenStackGuid = "038b3b"
    local damageTokenGuids = { "cc1299", "58a255", "fe0049", "7dd943" }

    -- If the Pegasus is already destroyed, place it and the damage tokens. Otherwise, remove it and the damage tokens. Also update the label of the button.
    if settings.pegasusDestroyed then
        settings.pegasusDestroyed = false
        board.editButton({
            index = buttonIndex,
            label = "Destroy"
        })

        -- Place the Pegasus.
        local pegasusBoard = addExpansionBoard(pegasusBox, pegasusBoardGuid, { 35.18, 0.71, -0.41 }, { 0, 180, 0 })

        -- Add the Pegasus damage tokens.
        local damageTokens = takeFromContainer(pegasusBox, damageTokenStackGuid, decks.pegasus_damage.position, { 180, 0, 0 }, true, function(object)
            -- Lock them and shuffle them when they're in place.
            Wait.condition(function()
                object.setLock(true)
                object.shuffle()
            end, function()
                return object.resting
            end)
        end)

        -- Set the destroy/repair button as inactive when the board and damage tokens are on the map.
        Wait.condition(function()
            setBoardButtonActiveStatus(buttonIdentifier, false)
        end, function()
            local pegasusBoard = getObjectFromGUID(pegasusBoardGuid)
            local damageTokens = getObjectFromGUID(damageTokenStackGuid)

            return (pegasusBoard ~= nil and pegasusBoard.resting) and (damageTokens ~= nil and damageTokens.resting)
        end)
    else
        -- Get the board and the damage tokens.
        local pegasusBoard = getObjectFromGUID(pegasusBoardGuid)
        local damageTokens = getObjectFromGUID(damageTokenStackGuid)

        settings.pegasusDestroyed = true
        board.editButton({
            index = buttonIndex,
            label = "Repair"
        })

        -- Retrieve the tokens and move them to the stack.
        local tokenStack = getObjectFromGUID(damageTokenStackGuid)

        -- Loop through the tokens.
        for key, value in ipairs(damageTokenGuids) do
            local token = getObjectFromGUID(value)

            -- If the token is on the map, flip it and move it into the stack.
            if token ~= nil then
                token.setRotation({ 180, 180, 0 })
                tokenStack.putObject(token)
            end
        end

        -- Wait until the tokens are all in the stack.
        Wait.condition(function()
            -- Move the board and the tokens to the box.
            if pegasusBoard and damageTokens then
                pegasusBox.putObject(pegasusBoard)
                pegasusBox.putObject(damageTokens)

                -- Set the place/remove button as inactive when the board and damage tokens are no longer on the map.
                Wait.condition(function()
                    setBoardButtonActiveStatus(buttonIdentifier, false)
                end, function()
                    return pegasusBoard == nil and damageTokens == nil
                end)
            end            
        end, function()
            return tokenStack.getQuantity() == #damageTokenGuids
        end)
    end
end

    local board = getObjectFromGUID("437cd7")

    -- Get the button data.
    local buttonIdentifier = "placeRemoveRebelBasestar"
    local button = getBoardButton(buttonIdentifier)
    local buttonIndex = button.index
    local buttonActive = button.active

    -- If the button is active, stop. Otherwise, mark it as active.
    if buttonActive then
        return
    end
    setBoardButtonActiveStatus(buttonIdentifier, true)

    -- Get the box, as well as the GUIDs of the Rebel Basestar board and Basestar Allegiance marker.
    local daybreakBox = getObjectFromGUID("9fac0e")
    local rebelBasestarGuid = "05a670"
    local allegianceMarkerGuid = "8beab7"

    -- If the board is already placed, remove it and the Basestar Allegiance marker. Otherwise, add the board and the marker. Also update the label of the button.
    if settings.rebelBasestarPlaced then
        -- Get the board and the marker.
        local rebelBasestarBoard = getObjectFromGUID(rebelBasestarGuid)

        end

        settings.rebelBasestarPlaced = false
        board.editButton({
            index = buttonIndex,

        })

        -- Move the board and the marker to the box.
        if rebelBasestarBoard and allegianceMarker then
            daybreakBox.putObject(rebelBasestarBoard)
            daybreakBox.putObject(allegianceMarker)

            -- Set the place/remove button as inactive when the board and marker are no longer on the map.
            Wait.condition(function()
                setBoardButtonActiveStatus(buttonIdentifier, false)
            end, function()
                return rebelBasestarBoard == nil and allegianceMarker == nil
            end)
        end
    else
        settings.rebelBasestarPlaced = true
        board.editButton({
            index = buttonIndex,
            label = "Remove Rebel Basestar"
        })

        -- Add the Rebel Basestar.
        addExpansionBoard(daybreakBox, rebelBasestarGuid, { -28.50, 0.71, 17.28 }, { 0, 180, 0 })

        -- If the button was right clicked, flip the Rebel Basestar allegiance marker to the human side.
        local rotation = alt_click and { 180, 0, 0 } or { 0, 180, 0 }

        -- Add the marker and lock it, so it doesn't end up in the hand on the side of the table.
        takeFromContainer(daybreakBox, allegianceMarkerGuid, { -21.28, 0.75, 13.72 }, rotation)

        -- Once the board and marker are in position, set the place/remove button as active.
        Wait.condition(function()
            setBoardButtonActiveStatus(buttonIdentifier, false)
        end, function()
            local rebelBasestarBoard = getObjectFromGUID(rebelBasestarGuid)
            local allegianceMarker = getObjectFromGUID(allegianceMarkerGuid)

            return (rebelBasestarBoard ~= nil and rebelBasestarBoard.resting) and (allegianceMarker ~= nil and allegianceMarker.resting)
        end)
    end

-- Fires when the "Build Destiny Deck" button is clicked.
function buildDestinyDeck(object, player, alt_click, callback)
    -- Get all relevant objects.
    local destinyDeckZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.destiny.guid)
    local drawDecksZones = { "Politics", "Leadership", "Tactics", "Piloting", "Engineering" }

    -- If Pegasus or Daybreak are enabled, add Treachery cards to the destiny deck.
    if settings.expansions.pegasus.enabled or settings.expansions.daybreak.enabled then
        table.insert(drawDecksZones, "Treachery")
    end

    -- Throw an error if the destiny deck already contains a deck.
    if getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, false) then
        broadcastToAll("Unable to build the destiny deck, as the destiny deck pile already contains a deck or card.", player)
        return
    end

    -- Keep track of how many cards were added, so we know when to shuffle. In case one of the skill card and skill card discard piles is empty, we can then shuffle earlier.
    local addedCards = 0

    -- Build the destiny deck.
    for key, value in ipairs(drawDecksZones) do
        -- Get two cards from each deck and add them to the Destiny deck.
        getCardsFromSkillCardsDeck(value, 2, function(deck, amount)
            for i = 1, amount, 1 do 
                addedCards = addedCards + 1
                -- If it's a single card.
                if deck.type == "Card" then
                    deck.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks.destiny.position))
                -- If it's a deck.
                else
                    deck.takeObject({
                        index = 0,
                        position = adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks.destiny.position)
                    })
                end
            end
        end)
    end

    -- Shuffle the destiny deck after the deck is built.
    Wait.condition(function() 
        local destinyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Deck" }, true)
        destinyDeck.shuffle()

        if callback then
            callback(destinyDeck)
        end
    end, function()
        -- Wait until the Destiny deck is built. There must be a deck in the Destiny deck area, it must be resting, and the deck must contain two cards of each type.
        local destinyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Deck" }, true)
        return destinyDeck ~= nil and destinyDeck.getQuantity() == addedCards
    end)
end

-- Adds cards from the destiny deck to the skill check.
function addDestinyDeck(object, player, alt_click)
    -- Get all relevant objects.
    local destinyDeckZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.destiny.guid)
    local skillCheckPosition = adjustPositionAboveDeck(decks.skill_check.position)
    local destinyDeckCardDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, true)

    -- If the Destiny deck contains no cards, rebuild it.
    if not destinyDeckCardDeck then 
        buildDestinyDeck(nil, nil, nil, function()
            local destinyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Deck" }, true)
            -- Take two cards from the Destiny deck and put them into the skill check.
            for i = 1, 2, 1 do 
                destinyDeck.takeObject({
                    index = 0,
                    position = skillCheckPosition
                })
            end
        end)
    -- If the Destiny deck contains one card, move it to the zone, then rebuild it, and move another card to the zone.
    elseif destinyDeckCardDeck and destinyDeckCardDeck.type == "Card" then 
        local card = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Card" }, true)
        card.setPositionSmooth(skillCheckPosition)

        -- Wait until the Destiny deck area is empty.
        Wait.condition(function() 
            buildDestinyDeck(nil, nil, nil, function()
                local destinyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Deck" }, true)
                destinyDeck.takeObject({
                    index = 0,
                    position = skillCheckPosition
                })
            end)
        end, function()
            return #destinyDeckZone.getObjects() == 0
        end)
    -- Otherwise, move two cards to the zone.
    else
        -- Take two cards from the Destiny deck and put them into the skill check.
        local destinyDeck = getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(destinyDeckZone, { "Deck" }, true)
        if destinyDeck then 
            for i = 1, 2, 1 do 
                destinyDeck.takeObject({
                    index = 0,
                    position = skillCheckPosition
                })
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Counts the value of the cards currently in the skill check, separated by card type.
function countSkillCheck(object, player, alt_click)
    -- Get the objects in the skill check zone.
    local skillCheckZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.skill_check.guid)

    -- The values per card type. The skill types are predefined so they are sorted.
    local cardTypeValues = {
        Politics = {
            color = { r = 198/255, g = 180/255, b = 29/255 },
            count = 0
        },
        Leadership = {
            color = { r = 3/255, g = 112/255, b = 57/255 },
            count = 0
        },
        Tactics = {
            color = { r = 102/255, g = 55/255, b = 152/255 },
            count = 0
        },
        Piloting = {
            color = { r = 173/255, g = 25/255, b = 32/255 },
            count = 0
        },
        Engineering = {
            color = { r = 2/255, g = 101/255, b = 155/255 },
            count = 0
        },
        Treachery = {
            color = { r = 182/255, g = 119/255, b = 39/255 },
            count = 0
        }
    }

    -- Throw an error if the skill check zone doesn't contain any cards.
    if not getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(skillCheckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, false) then
        broadcastToColor("Unable to count the skill check, as it does not contain any decks or cards. Place skill cards that need to be counted into the skill check area above the button.", player)
        return
    end

    -- Loop through all objects in the skill check zone and count them.
    for key, value in ipairs(skillCheckZone.getObjects()) do
        -- Check if we're dealing with a stack and handle it appropriately.
        if value.type == "Deck" then
            -- Loop through the cards in the deck to add their value.
            for cardKey, cardValue in ipairs(value.getObjects()) do
                addCardValue(cardValue, cardTypeValues)
            end
        -- Otherwise, add the value of the single card.
        else
            addCardValue(value, cardTypeValues)
        end
    end

    -- Print the output message.
    printToAll("Skill check count:")
    for key, value in pairs(cardTypeValues) do
        printToAll(key .. ": " .. value.count, value.color)
    end
end

-- Adds the value of a card to a values array.
function addCardValue(card, cardTypeValues)
    -- Get the type and the value.
    local cardType = getCardType(card)
    local value = getCardValue(card)

    -- If the card has a value, add it.
    if value ~= nil then
        -- If the type isn't in the table yet, add it.
        if cardTypeValues[cardType] == nil then
            cardTypeValues[cardType] = {
                color = { r = 255/255, g = 255/255, b = 255/255 },
                count = value
            }
        -- Otherwise, increment it.
        else
            cardTypeValues[cardType].count = cardTypeValues[cardType].count + value
        end
    end

    return cardTypeValues
end

-- Discards all cards in the skill check area into their respective discard pile.
function discardSkillCheck(object, player, alt_click)
    -- Get the objects in the skill check zone.
    local skillCheckZone = getObjectFromGUID(decks.skill_check.guid)

    -- Throw an error if the skill check zone doesn't contain any cards.
    if not getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(skillCheckZone, { "Deck", "Card" }, false) then
        broadcastToColor("Unable to discard the skill check, as it does not contain any decks or cards. Place skill cards that need to be discarded into the skill check area above the button.", player)
        return
    end

    -- Loop through all objects in the skill check zone and discard them.
    for key, value in ipairs(skillCheckZone.getObjects()) do
        -- Check if we're dealing with a deck and handle it appropriately.
        if value.type == "Deck" then
            -- Loop through the cards in the deck to discard them individually.
            for cardKey, cardValue in ipairs(value.getObjects()) do
                -- Get the discard pile of the card.
                local deckDiscardTable = getDiscardPile(cardValue)

                -- Only continue if it has a discard table.
                if deckDiscardTable then
                    -- Discard the card. Make a copy of the discard table so we don't modify the original.
                    value.takeObject({
                        index = 0,
                        position = adjustPositionAboveDeck({ deckDiscardTable.position[1], deckDiscardTable.position[2], deckDiscardTable.position[3] }),
                        rotation = { 0, 180, 0 }
                    })
                end
            end
        -- Otherwise, discard the single card to the appropriate stack.
        else
            discardSkillCard(player, value)
        end
    end
end

-- Gets the description of a card.
function getCardDescription(card)
    --If it's a table, use the value. Otherwise use the getter.
    return type(card) == "table" and card.description or card.getDescription()
end

-- Gets the type of card from the description (for instance, "Leadership" or "Crisis").
function getCardType(card)
    -- Split the string.
    local split = string.split(getCardDescription(card), "-")

    -- The first value of the card's description is always the type. Each card has a type. If there is no first value, it has no type.
    return #split == 0 and nil or string.trim(split[1])
end

-- Gets the attribute of a card from the description (for instance, "Reckless" or "Player Chooses").
function getCardAttribute(card)
    -- Split the string.
    local split = string.split(getCardDescription(card), "-")

    -- If there's only one value or the second value is numerical, it has no attribute.
    if #split == 1 or tonumber(split[2]) ~= nil then
        return nil
    -- Otherwise, it's always the second value.
    else
        return string.trim(split[2])
    end

    return nil
end

-- Gets the value of a card from the description (for instance, "0" or "4")
function getCardValue(card)
    -- Split the string.
    local split = string.split(getCardDescription(card), "-")

    -- If there's only one value, it has no attribute.
    if #split == 1 then
        return nil
    -- If the second value is numerical, it's the value.
    elseif tonumber(split[2]) ~= nil then
        local stringValue = string.trim(split[2])
        return tonumber(stringValue)
    -- If the third value is numerical, it's the value.
    elseif tonumber(split[3]) ~= nil then
        local stringValue = string.trim(split[3])
        return tonumber(stringValue)
    end

    return nil
end

-- Gets the discard pile for a given card type.
function getDiscardPile(card)
    -- Get the card type.
    local cardType = getCardType(card)

    -- Replace lowercase the type and replace spaces with underscores to match the table.
    local adjustedString = string.lower(string.gsub(cardType, ' ', '_'))

    return decks.discard[adjustedString]
end

-- Discards a single skill card to its own stack.
function discardSkillCard(player, card)
    local deckDiscardTable = getDiscardPile(card)

    -- If the card can't be found in the discard table, cancel. There may be a non-skill card in the skill check.
    if not deckDiscardTable then
        if player then
            broadcastToColor("Error discarding the skill check, as there is an object in the skill check area that is not a skill check deck or card.", player)
        end
        return
    end

    -- Get the card's discard position. Make a copy of the discard table so we don't modify the original.
    local discardPosition = { deckDiscardTable.position[1], deckDiscardTable.position[2], deckDiscardTable.position[3] }

    -- Discard the card.
    card.setRotationSmooth({ 0, 180, 0 })
    card.setPositionSmooth(adjustPositionAboveDeck(discardPosition))
end

-- Determine the loyalties of a player.
function determinePlayerLoyalties(color)
    local hand = getObjectFromGUID(hands[color])

    local loyalties = {}

    -- Loop through the player's cards in their hands.
    for key, value in pairs(hand.getObjects()) do
        local type = getCardType(value)

        -- If it's a loyalty card, continue.
        if type == "Loyalty" then
            local attribute = getCardAttribute(value)
            table.insert(loyalties, attribute)
        end
    end

    return loyalties
end

-- Adjusts the given position so it appears just above a deck. Make a copy of the array, so it doesn't adjust the original.
function adjustPositionAboveDeck(position)
    return { position[1], position[2] + 0.5, position[3] }
end

-- Checks if a given object is in a given position.
function isInPosition(object, position)
    local objectPosition = object.getPosition()

    return objectPosition[1] == position[1] and objectPosition[2] == position[2] and objectPosition[3] == position[3]
end

-- Gets the first object of a given array of types from a scripting zone. If set, it will only return objects that are resting.
function getFirstObjectOfTypesFromZone(zone, types, checkResting)
    for key, value in pairs(zone.getObjects()) do
        if table.inTable(types, value.type) and (not checkResting or value.resting) then
            return value
        end
    end
end

-- Gets the objects of a given array of types from a scripting zone. If set, it will only return objects that are resting.
function getObjectsOfTypesFromZone(zone, types, checkResting)
    local objects = {}

    for key, value in pairs(zone.getObjects()) do
        if table.inTable(types, value.type) and (not checkResting or value.resting) then
            table.insert(objects, value)
        end
    end
    
    return objects
end

-- Splits a string by the given delimiter.
function string:split(delimiter)
    local result = {}
    local from = 1

    local delimiter_from, delimiter_to = string.find(self, delimiter, from)

    while delimiter_from do
        table.insert(result, string.sub(self, from, delimiter_from - 1))
        from = delimiter_to + 1
        delimiter_from, delimiter_to = string.find(self, delimiter, from)
    end

    table.insert(result, string.sub(self, from))

    return result
end

-- Trims a string.
function string:trim()
    return self:gsub("^%s*(.-)%s*$", "%1")
end

-- Gets the length of a table.
function table:length()
    local count = 0
    for element in pairs(self) do 
        count = count + 1 
    end

    return count
end

-- Check if a value is in a table.
function table:inTable(value)
    for tableKey, tableValue in ipairs(self) do
        if value == tableValue then
            return true
        end
    end

    return false
end

-- Gets the index of a value in a given table.
function table:indexOf(value)
    for tableKey, tableValue in ipairs(self) do 
        if tableValue == value then 
            return tableKey
        end
    end
end

-- Removes an element from a table by value.
function table:removeByValue(value)
    local index = table.indexOf(self, value)
    if index then
        table.remove(self, index)
    end

    return self
end

-- Stringifies a table.
function table:toString(indent)
    if not indent then 
        indent = 0 
    end

    local stringified = string.rep(" ", indent) .. "{\r\n"
    indent = indent + 2 

    for key, value in pairs(self) do
        stringified = stringified .. string.rep(" ", indent)
        if (type(key) == "number") then
            stringified = stringified .. "[" .. key .. "] = "
        elseif (type(key) == "string") then
            stringified = stringified  .. key ..  "= "   
        end

        if (type(value) == "number") then
            stringified = stringified .. value .. ",\r\n"
        elseif (type(value) == "string") then
            stringified = stringified .. "\"" .. value .. "\",\r\n"
        elseif (type(value) == "table") then
            stringified = stringified .. table.toString(value, indent + 2) .. ",\r\n"
        else
            stringified = stringified .. "\"" .. tostring(value) .. "\",\r\n"
        end
    end

    stringified = stringified .. string.rep(" ", indent-2) .. "}"

    return stringified
end

-- The height of the concealed storage.
local concealedStorageHeight = 3.0

-- The offset of the concealed storage.
local conceiledStorageOffset = 10000.0

-- The state of the storage.
local storageState = 1

-- The bounds of the storage.
local bounds = {
	min = {
		x = -16.0,
		y = 41.99,
		z = -50.0
	},
	max = {
		x = 16.0,
		y = 41.99,
		z = -32.0
	}
}

-- Fires when the object is loaded.
function onLoad()
	-- Mark it as uninteractable and create the cabinet button.
    self.interactable = false;
	
    self.createButton({
		label = "",
		click_function = "onButtonClick",
		function_owner = self,
		width = 1000,
		height = 750,
		color = {1, 0, 0, 0.0},
		position = {0, 40.7, 50.5},
		rotation = {-90, 0, 0},
		font_size = 200
    })
	
	-- Call the afterLoad function after a short timer.
	if self.getStateId() ~= storageState then
		Timer.create({
			identifier = ("onAfterLoad" .. self.guid),
			function_name = "onAfterLoad",
			delay = 0.2
		})
	end
end

-- Called a short time after the object is loaded.
function onAfterLoad()
	-- Get the position variables.
	local position = self.getPosition()
	local rotation = self.getRotation()
	local direction = 1.0
	
	-- Change the direction based on the rotation.
	if rotation.y == 0 then
		direction = -1.0
	end
	
	-- Set the bounds.
	bounds.min.x = bounds.min.x + position.x
	bounds.min.y = bounds.min.y + position.y - 1.5
	bounds.min.z = (bounds.min.z * direction) + position.z
	
	bounds.max.x = 	bounds.max.x + position.x
	bounds.max.y = 	bounds.max.y + position.y + concealedStorageHeight + 0.5
	bounds.max.z = (bounds.max.z * direction) + position.z
	
	-- Hide objects above the cabinet.
	hideObjectsAbove(false)
end

-- Fires when the cabinet button is clicked.
function onButtonClick()
	-- Set the state and hide objects if applicable.
	local currentState = self.getStateId()
	local nextState = 1 + (currentState % 2)
	
	if currentState ~= storageState then
		hideObjectsAbove(true)
	end
	
	self.setState(nextState)
end

-- Hides objects above the cabinet.
function hideObjectsAbove(toggle)
	local objectsAbove = {}

	-- Set the minimum and maximum bounds.
	local boundsMin = { x = bounds.min.x, y = bounds.min.y, z = bounds.min.z }
	local boundsMax = { x = bounds.max.x, y = bounds.max.y, z = bounds.max.z }
	
	if not toggle then
		boundsMin.y = boundsMin.y - conceiledStorageOffset
		boundsMax.y = boundsMax.y - conceiledStorageOffset
	end
	
	-- Loop through the objects in the cabinet and decide what to do.
    for key, value in pairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if value != self then
            if pointToAABBIntersect(boundsMin, boundsMax, value.getPosition()) then
                if toggle then
                    store(value)
                else
                    dispense(value)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Check if the position of an object is within the bounds of cabinet. Assumes the minimum is smaller than the maximum.
function pointToAABBIntersect(min, max, point)
    if isInRange(point.x, min.x, max.x) and
       isInRange(point.y, min.y, max.y) and
       isInRange(point.z, min.z, max.z) then
	   return true
    end
    
    return false
end

-- Checks if an object is in range.
function isInRange(value, a, b)
	local min = 0
	local max = 0
	
	if a > b then
		max = a
		min = b
	else
		max = b
		min = a
	end
	
	if value > min and value < max then
		return true
	end
	
	return false
end

-- Stores an object.
function store(object)
	local position = object.getPosition()
	local isLocked = object.getLock()
	
	object.setVar("LockStatus", isLocked)
	
    object.interactable = false
    object.setLock(true)
    object.setPosition({
        x = position.x,
        y = position.y - conceiledStorageOffset,
        z = position.z
    })
end

-- Dispenses an object.
function dispense(object)
	local position = object.getPosition()
	local originalLockStatus = object.getVar("LockStatus")
	
    object.setPosition({
        x = position.x,
        y = position.y + conceiledStorageOffset,
        z = position.z
    })
	
    object.interactable = true
	
	if originalLockStatus ~= nil and originalLockStatus == true then
		object.setLock(true)
	else
		object.setLock(false)
	end
end

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- The name of the tracker.
local trackerName = "Jump Preparation"

-- The starting position of the tracker.
local startingPosition = 1

-- The current value the tracker is on.
local currentValue = 1

-- The smallest and largest X position of this track.
local xPositions = { -3.82, 5.64 }

-- The Y position of this track.
local yPosition = 0.85

-- The Z position of this track.
local zPosition = 19.89

-- The amount of distance on the X axis that's between each value.
local xIncrements = 2.37

-- The variation allowed when checking if the tracker is on the track.
local variation = 0.05

-- The minimum and maximum values of the track.
local minMaxValues = { 1, 5 }

-- Fires when the tracker is picked up. Set the current value of the tracker.
function onPickUp(color) 
	-- Check if the object is actually on the track.
	if isOnTrack() then
		-- Set the current value of the tracker.
		currentValue = getCurrentValue()
	end
end

-- Fires when the tracker is dropped. Prints the old and current value of the tracker.
function onDrop(color)
	-- Wait until the tracker has hit the ground.
	Wait.condition(function()
		-- Check if the object is actually on the track.
		if isOnTrack() then
			-- Broadcasts the old and new value of the tracker.
			local newValue = getCurrentValue()
			
			-- Broadcast if there's a change.
			if currentValue ~= newValue then
				broadcastToAll(color .. " has set the " .. trackerName .. " from \"" .. currentValue .. "\" to \"" .. newValue .. "\".")
			end

			-- Update the current value.
			currentValue = newValue
		end
	end, isReady)
end

-- Gets the current value of the track.
function getCurrentValue()
	-- Get the distance between the smallest position of the track and the current position.
	local distanceFromBase = xPositions[1] - self.getPosition()[1]
	-- Get the number of increments between the base position and the current position.
	local increments = ((distanceFromBase / xIncrements) * -1) + startingPosition

	-- Round the value up or down.
	local value = math.floor(increments + 0.5)

	return adjustValueWithinBounds(value)
end

-- Sets the current value of the track.
function setValue(value)
	-- Adjust the value to be within the bounds.
	value = adjustValueWithinBounds(value)

	-- Calculate the new X position. It's the starting position plus the X axis increment multiplied by the target value.
	local newXPosition = xPositions[1] + (xIncrements * value)

	-- Set the position.
	self.setPositionSmooth({ newXPosition, yPosition, zPosition })
end

-- Adjust a given value to be within the bounds of the track.
function adjustValueWithinBounds(value)
	-- If the value is smaller the minimum value or larger than the maximum value, set it to the minimum or maximum value.
	if value < minMaxValues[1] then
		value = minMaxValues[1]
	elseif value > minMaxValues[2] then
		value = minMaxValues[2]
	end

	return value
end

-- Checks if the tracker is ready to be checked.
function isReady()
	return self.resting
end

-- Determines if the tracker is currently on the track. Each of these checks allow for a variation to account for inaccurate positions.
function isOnTrack()
	-- Check if the tracker is on the X axis of the track.
	local myXPosition = self.getPosition()[1]
	local onTrackerX = myXPosition > xPositions[1] - variation and myXPosition < xPositions[2] + variation

	-- Check if the tracker is on the Y axis of the track.
	local myYPosition = self.getPosition()[2]
	local onTrackerY = myYPosition > yPosition - variation and myYPosition < yPosition + variation

	-- Check if the tracker is on the Z axis of the track.
	local myZPosition = self.getPosition()[3]
	local onTrackerZ = myZPosition > zPosition - variation and myZPosition < zPosition + variation

	return onTrackerX and onTrackerY and onTrackerZ
end
