-- The height of the concealed storage.
local concealedStorageHeight = 3.0

-- The offset of the concealed storage.
local conceiledStorageOffset = 10000.0

-- The state of the storage.
local storageState = 1

-- The bounds of the storage.
local bounds = {
	min = {
		x = -16.0,
		y = 41.99,
		z = -50.0
	},
	max = {
		x = 16.0,
		y = 41.99,
		z = -32.0
	}
}

-- Fires when the object is loaded.
function onLoad()
	-- Mark it as uninteractable and create the cabinet button.
    self.interactable = false;
	
    self.createButton({
		label = "",
		click_function = "onButtonClick",
		function_owner = self,
		width = 1000,
		height = 750,
		color = {1, 0, 0, 0.0},
		position = {0, 40.7, 50.5},
		rotation = {-90, 0, 0},
		font_size = 200
    })
	
	-- Call the afterLoad function after a short timer.
	if self.getStateId() ~= storageState then
		Timer.create({
			identifier = ("onAfterLoad" .. self.guid),
			function_name = "onAfterLoad",
			delay = 0.2
		})
	end
end

-- Called a short time after the object is loaded.
function onAfterLoad()
	-- Get the position variables.
	local position = self.getPosition()
	local rotation = self.getRotation()
	local direction = 1.0
	
	-- Change the direction based on the rotation.
	if rotation.y == 0 then
		direction = -1.0
	end
	
	-- Set the bounds.
	bounds.min.x = bounds.min.x + position.x
	bounds.min.y = bounds.min.y + position.y - 1.5
	bounds.min.z = (bounds.min.z * direction) + position.z
	
	bounds.max.x = 	bounds.max.x + position.x
	bounds.max.y = 	bounds.max.y + position.y + concealedStorageHeight + 0.5
	bounds.max.z = (bounds.max.z * direction) + position.z
	
	-- Hide objects above the cabinet.
	hideObjectsAbove(false)
end

-- Fires when the cabinet button is clicked.
function onButtonClick()
	-- Set the state and hide objects if applicable.
	local currentState = self.getStateId()
	local nextState = 1 + (currentState % 2)
	
	if currentState ~= storageState then
		hideObjectsAbove(true)
	end
	
	self.setState(nextState)
end

-- Hides objects above the cabinet.
function hideObjectsAbove(toggle)
	local objectsAbove = {}

	-- Set the minimum and maximum bounds.
	local boundsMin = { x = bounds.min.x, y = bounds.min.y, z = bounds.min.z }
	local boundsMax = { x = bounds.max.x, y = bounds.max.y, z = bounds.max.z }
	
	if not toggle then
		boundsMin.y = boundsMin.y - conceiledStorageOffset
		boundsMax.y = boundsMax.y - conceiledStorageOffset
	end
	
	-- Loop through the objects in the cabinet and decide what to do.
    for key, value in pairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if value != self then
            if pointToAABBIntersect(boundsMin, boundsMax, value.getPosition()) then
                if toggle then
                    store(value)
                else
                    dispense(value)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Check if the position of an object is within the bounds of cabinet. Assumes the minimum is smaller than the maximum.
function pointToAABBIntersect(min, max, point)
    if isInRange(point.x, min.x, max.x) and
       isInRange(point.y, min.y, max.y) and
       isInRange(point.z, min.z, max.z) then
	   return true
    end
    
    return false
end

-- Checks if an object is in range.
function isInRange(value, a, b)
	local min = 0
	local max = 0
	
	if a > b then
		max = a
		min = b
	else
		max = b
		min = a
	end
	
	if value > min and value < max then
		return true
	end
	
	return false
end

-- Stores an object.
function store(object)
	local position = object.getPosition()
	local isLocked = object.getLock()
	
	object.setVar("LockStatus", isLocked)
	
    object.interactable = false
    object.setLock(true)
    object.setPosition({
        x = position.x,
        y = position.y - conceiledStorageOffset,
        z = position.z
    })
end

-- Dispenses an object.
function dispense(object)
	local position = object.getPosition()
	local originalLockStatus = object.getVar("LockStatus")
	
    object.setPosition({
        x = position.x,
        y = position.y + conceiledStorageOffset,
        z = position.z
    })
	
    object.interactable = true
	
	if originalLockStatus ~= nil and originalLockStatus == true then
		object.setLock(true)
	else
		object.setLock(false)
	end
end

	end
	
	-- Set the bounds.
	bounds.min.x = bounds.min.x + position.x
	bounds.min.y = bounds.min.y + position.y - 1.5
	bounds.min.z = (bounds.min.z * direction) + position.z
	
	bounds.max.x = 	bounds.max.x + position.x
	bounds.max.y = 	bounds.max.y + position.y + concealedStorageHeight + 0.5
	bounds.max.z = (bounds.max.z * direction) + position.z
	
	-- Hide objects above the cabinet.
	hideObjectsAbove(false)
end

-- Fires when the cabinet button is clicked.
function onButtonClick()
	-- Set the state and hide objects if applicable.
	local currentState = self.getStateId()
	local nextState = 1 + (currentState % 2)
	
	if currentState ~= storageState then
		hideObjectsAbove(true)
	end
	
	self.setState(nextState)
end

-- Hides objects above the cabinet.
function hideObjectsAbove(toggle)
	local objectsAbove = {}

	-- Set the minimum and maximum bounds.
	local boundsMin = { x = bounds.min.x, y = bounds.min.y, z = bounds.min.z }
	local boundsMax = { x = bounds.max.x, y = bounds.max.y, z = bounds.max.z }
	
	if not toggle then
		boundsMin.y = boundsMin.y - conceiledStorageOffset
		boundsMax.y = boundsMax.y - conceiledStorageOffset
	end
	
	-- Loop through the objects in the cabinet and decide what to do.
    for key, value in pairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if value != self then
            if pointToAABBIntersect(boundsMin, boundsMax, value.getPosition()) then
                if toggle then
                    store(value)
                else
                    dispense(value)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

-- Check if the position of an object is within the bounds of cabinet. Assumes the minimum is smaller than the maximum.
function pointToAABBIntersect(min, max, point)
    if isInRange(point.x, min.x, max.x) and
       isInRange(point.y, min.y, max.y) and
       isInRange(point.z, min.z, max.z) then
	   return true
    end
    
    return false
end

-- Checks if an object is in range.
function isInRange(value, a, b)
	local min = 0
	local max = 0
	
	if a > b then
		max = a
		min = b
	else
		max = b
		min = a
	end
	
	if value > min and value < max then
		return true
	end
	
	return false
end

-- Stores an object.
function store(object)
	local position = object.getPosition()
	local isLocked = object.getLock()
	
	object.setVar("LockStatus", isLocked)
	
    object.interactable = false
    object.setLock(true)
    object.setPosition({
        x = position.x,
        y = position.y - conceiledStorageOffset,
        z = position.z
    })
end

-- Dispenses an object.
function dispense(object)
	local position = object.getPosition()
	local originalLockStatus = object.getVar("LockStatus")
	
    object.setPosition({
        x = position.x,
        y = position.y + conceiledStorageOffset,
        z = position.z
    })
	
    object.interactable = true
	
	if originalLockStatus ~= nil and originalLockStatus == true then
		object.setLock(true)
	else
		object.setLock(false)
	end
end

-- Keeps track of the buttons on the board.
boardButtons = {}

-- Fires when the object is loaded.
function onLoad()
    -- Mark the board as uninteractable.
    self.interactable = false

    -- Get the global settings.
    local settings = Global.getVar('settings')

    -- Create the "Customize/Lock Board" button.
    createBoardButton("customizeLockBoard", "onCustomizeLock", 75, self, 75, "CUSTOMIZE BOARD", { -15.5, 10, -5 }, { 180, 270, 80 }, "Makes the board (un)interactable.", 750)

    -- Create the "Destroy/Repair" Colonial One button.
    createBoardButton("destroyRepairColonialOne", "destroyRepairColonialOne", 60, Global, 30, settings.colonialOneDestroyed and "Repair" or "Destroy", { 8, 10.74, -3.30 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Destroys or repairs Colonial One. Use after a Super Crisis card from the base game is failed.", 400)

    -- Create the "Build Destiny Deck" button.
    createBoardButton("buildDestinyDeck", "buildDestinyDeck", 60, Global, 30, "Build Destiny Deck", { 10.91, 10.74, 5.7 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Builds the destiny deck by adding two cards from each skill check deck. Requires an empty destiny deck. Automatically rebuilds and shuffles empty skill card decks.", 600)

    -- Create the "Add Destiny Deck" button.
    createBoardButton("addDestinyDeck", "addDestinyDeck", 60, Global, 30, "Add Destiny", { -0.70, 10.74, -2.95 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Adds cards from the destiny deck into the skill check. Automatically rebuilds the Destiny deck if required.", 450)

    -- Create the "Count Skill Check" button.
    createBoardButton("countSkillCheck", "countSkillCheck", 60, Global, 30, "Count", { 0.23, 10.74, -2.95 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Counts the value of each card in the skill check area.", 450)

    -- Create the "Discard Skill Check" button.
    createBoardButton("discardSkillCheck", "discardSkillCheck", 60, Global, 30, "Discard", { 1.16, 10.74, -2.95 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Discard all cards from the skill check area into their respective discard pile.", 450)
end

-- Creates a button on the board and keeps track of it.
function createBoardButton(identifier, click_function, font_size, function_owner, height, label, position, rotation, tooltip, width)
    -- Create the button.
    self.createButton({
        click_function = click_function,
        font_size = font_size,
        function_owner = function_owner,
        height = height,
        label = label,
        position = position,
        rotation = rotation,
        tooltip = tooltip,
        width = width
    })

    -- Add it to the array.
    boardButtons[identifier] = {
        index = #self.getButtons() - 1,
        active = false
    }
end

-- Fires when the "Customize/Lock Board" button is clicked. Allows the board to be customized or locks it.
function onCustomizeLock()
    local buttonIndex = boardButtons["customizeLockBoard"].index

    -- Mark the board as (un)interactable, set the color, and modify the button depending on the current state.
    if self.interactable == false then
        self.interactable = true;
        self.setColorTint({ 1, 1, 1 })
        self.editButton({ 
            index = buttonIndex,
            label = "LOCK BOARD" 
        })
    else
        self.interactable = false;
        self.editButton({
            index = buttonIndex,
            label = "CUSTOMIZE BOARD"
        })
    end
end

-- Creates the "Destroy/Repair" button for the Pegasus.
function createDestroyRepairPegasusButton()
    -- Get the settings.
    local settings = Global.getVar("settings")

    -- Create the button.
    createBoardButton("repairDestroyPegasus", "repairDestroyPegasus", 60, Global, 30, settings.pegasusDestroyed and "Repair" or "Destroy", { 10.9, 10.74, -0.88 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Moves the Pegasus off and on the board. Use if all four Pegasus locations have a damage token on them at the same time.", 400)
end

-- Creates the "Destroy/Repair" Resurrection Hub button.
function createDestroyRepairHubButton()
    -- Get the settings.
    local settings = Global.getVar("settings")

    -- Create the button.
    createBoardButton("destroyRepairHub", "destroyRepairHub", 60, Global, 30, settings.hubDestroyed and "Repair" or "Destroy", { -5.58, 10.74, 1.13 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Destroys or repairs the Resurrection Hub. Use after a mission from the Daybreak expansion is passed.", 400)
end

-- Creates the "Place/Remove Rebel Basestar" button.
function createPlaceRemoveRebelBasestarButton()
    -- Get the settings.
    local settings = Global.getVar("settings")

    -- Create the button.
    createBoardButton("placeRemoveRebelBasestar", "placeRemoveRebelBasestar", 60, Global, 30, settings.rebelBasestarPlaced and "Remove Rebel Basestar" or "Place Rebel Basestar", { -7.36, 10.74, -5.75 }, { 0, 0, 0 }, "Places or removes the Rebel Basestar. Use after a mission from the Daybreak expansion is passed or failed. Right click to flip the Basestar Allegiance Marker to the Human or Cylon side.", 650)
end
